reviews.text:
We are a medical aesthetics company. Searching for reliable legal information online can be time-consuming and overwhelming for us. So we engaged Holt Law as our legal advisory firm by purchasing their Service Bundle Package. The pricing was reasonable and highly competitive. Before selecting Holt Law, we had researched and compared many other firms and similar service packages online. We found that some providers charged between $12,000 and $30,000 for comparable all-inclusive services.

Holt Law’s package offers a comprehensive, end-to-end solution that includes the preparation of all necessary licenses and government filings required before opening, as well as legal documentation tailored specifically to our company name for ongoing business operations. What’s more, a representative from the firm walks us through each document during one-on-one Zoom meetings, explaining important details and compliance requirements.

Their responsiveness is outstanding—although their stated response time is five business days, we often receive replies the same day or the next. We are also able to speak directly with their legal assistants by phone, which has helped us resolve urgent issues efficiently. Additionally, their online scheduling system allows us to book Zoom consultations at our convenience to receive immediate and professional answers.

With this law consultation company, we can rely on prompt, expert guidance without the hassle and save plenty of time. Their services are not only affordable but also exceptional in quality and thoroughness. We highly recommend Holt Law to any business in need of trustworthy and comprehensive legal support.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Eileen, thank you so much for sharing your experience. We’re grateful you chose Holt Law after comparing so many options, and we’re glad our Service Bundle Package provided the affordability and depth you were looking for.

Our goal is always to make the legal side of launching and running a healthcare business less overwhelming, so it’s encouraging to hear that the one-on-one Zoom walkthroughs, timely responses, and direct phone support have been valuable for your team.

We truly appreciate your recommendation and look forward to continuing to support your medical aesthetics business as it grows.

Going up against my employer was intimidating and emotionally draining, but Baharan never wavered. reviews.text: I had the pleasure of working with Bahar for a wrongful termination case, while being pregnant. The moment I began telling her the details of my wrongful termination, without hesitation she took me as a client and began the process of fighting for mitigation. The defendant happens to be a well-known company, but that did not stop her from taking my case. What I admire most about Bahar is her willingness to fight! If you tell her your needs, and a reasonable expectation as to what you would hope to receive out of a mitigation, she will get it done! It took many conversations with the opposing counsel, many offers, but none were the one I felt were appropriate for my case. Bahar's persistence allowed us to win the case, without settling for less or having to escalate the case to the next level. She was very transparent throughout the entire process, and I am so thankful to have had her fight for me during a time where I felt completely hopeless. Thank you Bahar!
reviews.ownerResponse: Dear Allison, thank you so much for your kind words and trust throughout the process. reviews.text: I did not know anything about the whole Workers Comp process and did not think I needed an attorney. First of all, you DO. However, Attorney Blumen and his amazing team helped make the process easier, and the outcome turned out much better than I imagined. He fought to get me what I deserved, which was much more than what was being offered at first. He is straightforward, to-the-point, and sharp! He is a powerful force!  At the same time, he is also very kind, understanding, patient, and empathetic towards his clients, as he was with me. reviews.text:
In December 2019, I had a freeway rear-end collision and was lucky to be referred to Scott Blumen.

During our first meeting, Scott Blumen shared his extensive experience in handling injury cases and navigating the complexities of the medical field and insurance companies. His transparency instilled calm and confidence in his representation.

Scott Blumen gave me straightforward advice about the value of my case, without exaggerating possible results or giving empty promises. He's dedicated to achieving the best possible resolution for the client.

Scott Blumen has put together an amazing team, where every member is essential for the office's success. Rand J. Feura, the Personal Injury Case Manager, really stood out with great communication skills and an incredible eye for detail.

The case took awhile, but Scott Blumen and his team's diligent efforts yielded a markedly improved outcome, highlighting their unwavering integrity and dedication. I will be forever grateful.

If you're seeking a top-tier exceptional personal injury attorney, choose Scott Blumen.

3 years ago we applied for a permanent residency Visa for my wife and stepdaughter... we paid the attorney $7000.00. We are still waiting for an interview and have all our paperwork done...their cases were filed separately (we needed them filed together so the interview would be at the same time), we got handed off to a paralegal who didn't keep us updated... the attorney is never in the office... our calls are always via cell phone when we can reach her... or meetings are always via cell phone... we get our updates via the evening news...horrendous service...very disappointed and still waiting... we don't recommend this train wreck... if your looking... keep looking.

Update to the above post... it has now been 4 years and still no interview (we were placed on the interview que...back in February of last year) , we did get a phone call from the atty who promised to keep us updated and to let us know if we needed anything call her directly... if we don't email her we get no update... and got short responses when she did respond. We were told the wait for the interview was 13-15 months...meanwhile on the evening news immigrants are getting admitted by the thousands... the evening news...really

Caso always has a smile.

Anthony and his team are amazing. They made sure my family was taken care of and our rights were acknowledged. His direct and honest approach made our nightmare so easy compared to how it would have been. Their diligent work cant be described and i am proud to call him a friend. If you put your faith in him and his team you will absolutely be amazed with the outcome. Pure professionalism and family. Thank you Anthony and Anastasia!

LENGTHY
- I initially inquired with them JANUARY 2024...

-We ended up settling out of court and through “mediation” April 2025…

- I did not receive the settlement amount until AUGUST 2025. 20 MONTHS from start to finish.

* No court, no trial. The “work” consisted of 1 initial zoom meeting, maybe 2 or 3 5 minute phone calls, laggy email communication over the course of a over a YEAR and 1 zoom mediation meeting in the end where we basically went back and forth starting at -$0 until we came “up to an agreed upon amount” which I believe was pre determined between attorneys before the mediation even began. Ultimately much less than me and my attorney originally discussed and agreed upon.

PRICEY
- I found out towards the end of the case & AFTER mediation from other attorneys, that the fee I was charged was WAY too much considering the amount of work that ended up being done (settling with no trial). I was charged 40% AND even when I asked the attorney to lower the fee (seeing as to how he “negotiated” down to much less than what we discussed) he declined. Not even a small consideration or adjustment.  So pretty much HALF of what me and my family settled on was not what was given. We lost our home, had to move, medical issues that are on going and expenses before/during/after the incident came out to much more than 60% of what we settled at.

FOR PROFIT ATTORNEYS/Not Really Client Success.
- Overall, I wish I would have done more research on Mold Attorneys instead on going with the first one that agreed to take my case. 40% is ridiculous, especially if your case is strong, not complex, has all supporting evidence/documentation AND ends in SETTLING THROUGH MEDIATION! A good learning lesson for me overall. I know business is business and the attorneys just want to make money… but being Flexible, having clear communication and making your clients feel like a priority should be part of why your charging HALF of what their entitled to OR you should charge less if you don’t want to DO more/faster & more professionally.

I’ve taken my loss. Initially I was gonna complain to the BAR… but later decided to just take my lesson & move on with what I learned about going through attorneys. Only writing this review because THEY requested a review.

All in all,  I wouldn’t recommend UNLESS you have no other options AND don’t mind HALF of your settlement amount being taken 🤷🏽‍♀️

I want to thank my attorney, Anthony Thompson, for his dedication and perseverance in my case. The outcome was incredibly excellent, and I am very happy with what he achieved. We will definitely recommend his excellent service. Thank you for everything. It is greatly appreciated.

We are incredibly grateful to Anthony and his team (Virginia was amazing!) for helping our family through a very difficult time. After discovering dangerous mold in our rental home that caused serious health issues for our family, we were overwhelmed and unsure of what to do next. They took the time to understand the impact this situation had on our lives, not just medically but emotionally and financially. They handled our case with professionalism and urgency, and thanks to their dedication, we received a fair settlement that is helping our family move forward.

If you’re dealing with mold-related injury, I highly recommend Anthony with Thompson Injury Law. He truly cares about his clients and will fight for the justice you deserve.

We had a leaking water heater and a pretty big interior sewage leak that went throughout our rental. He did an amazing job and my son (who got very sick from the contamination) and I are grateful we made the choice of attorney to be Mr. Thompson and his staff.  His assistant Virgina was prompt in responding to any questions I had.  She was also great at relaying any information that Mr. Thompson needed me to have.  Additionally, she's very pleasant and friendly to work with.  Hopefully I never, EVER, have to go through what we did but if I do, we will hope for Mr. Thompson's services.  We will strongly recommend him as well.  Lastly, I'm pretty sure the management company will think twice before mis treating tenants again. Great Job Anthony and Virginia.

We are incredibly grateful to Anthony Thompson and the entire team at Thompson Injury Law for their outstanding representation in our case involving a water-damaged building. Anthony and Virginia were consistently responsive, supportive, and compassionate throughout what turned out to be a long and challenging journey. They took the time to explain each step, answered all our questions promptly, and made us feel seen and heard during every stage of the process.

Thanks to their diligence and advocacy, we were able to reach a resolution that helped us begin to rebuild and move forward. We couldn’t have asked for a better team to have in our corner. Highly recommend Thompson Injury Law to anyone in need of dedicated, effective, and empathetic legal representation.

When you've been riding bikes as long as I have, you are bounds to have an accident or two. Sometimes it’s a careless driver and often damage to the road can create havoc for a cyclist. I think the most important thing for me when I reached out to Mike Bomberger, was I knew he understood me and the situations I was explaining. Having an attorney that's an accomplished cyclist and has put in many miles on the same roads I have was very comforting for me. Mike and his team have helped my family on two separate bikes injury cases and each time the process was smooth and nearly carefree on my part. I was regularly updated on status changes and when decisions needed to be made, Mike took the time to meet with us and help us choose the best route for our situation.
One of the cases involving road damage could have been closed rather quickly. Mike went ahead and made sure that the road was repaired as part of closing the lawsuit. The road repair didn’t effect our personal outcome, but it has made it safer for every cyclist to ride bikes in San Diego.
If you need a team of qualified, reliable lawyers that understand what bicyclists go through, then it's worth sitting down and talking to them about your situation.

Andrew Gavin
San Diego Ca.

reviews.text:
Attorney Ferrara, founder of Ferrara Law, APC, recently spoke to our Constitutional Law class on Rights and Liberties. As an SDSU alum and veteran, he brought credibility and real-world perspective to his presentation. He provided a clear and practical overview of key constitutional protections, including search and seizure, consent, probable cause, and the Fifth Amendment. Rather than discussing these topics in purely theoretical terms, he explained how they apply in real-world encounters with law enforcement. His ability to break down complex legal concepts into understandable, relevant examples made the material especially engaging.
Most impactful was his focus on educating students from the defendant’s perspective. He emphasized how individuals can and should protect themselves during detentions and interrogations. His approach was not anti-law enforcement, but grounded in the belief that understanding constitutional protections is essential to maintaining the balance between individual liberties and police authority. His knowledge, practical insight, and commitment to protecting individual rights demonstrate why a client should feel confident trusting him with their case.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for the positive feedback, Kimberly.  At Ferrara Law, APC we pride ourselves on community engagement and educating citizens.  We look forward to another presentation in the near future!

reviews.text: I was a pedestrian walking downtown San Diego walking at the cross walk on a green light and I was hit by a car. This was very traumatic for me and thankfully I am still here to speak about this. I was referred to The May Firm by my Chiropractor Dr. Tim Shannahan at Inner Balance Institute in San Diego. I was told by Dr. Tim The May Firm was very professional, honest, and really care for their Clients. I initially met with Angie at The May Firm who immediately made me fee comfortable, at ease, and Angie was able to answer all of my questions and concerns. Angie was able to tell me very quickly and honestly why The May Firm was a better choice for me compared to another "popular" or well know law firm I was thinking of going to. I'm very happy and more than satisfied I trusted my gut and went with The May Firm! My Case Manager Michael Gaines was Amazing! Extremely professional, intelligent, knowledgeable, and compassionate. I have been in pain from the accident and every time I've communicated with Michael weather through text or phone call he's always asked me how I was feeling. I could honestly tell The May Firm cares about my well being and not just a paycheck. They are honest kind hearted people. I've been blown away by the great experience I've had with the May Firm, they've shown me there really are still kind hearted people out there and a business you can trust. My case manager Michael Gaines always kept me put to date on the status of my case and I was never left wondering what to do next. The May firm is extremely communicative and never left me in the dark. Highly recommend coming here Five stars, Two thumbs up, and I will be giving them great reviews and referrals by word of mouth. reviews.text: Amazing caring law firm! If only all law firms acted with the kindness and integrity like they do!!

I cannot say enough about the professionalism and knowledge Jan has shown. I am so grateful to have been assisted and advised by her. She is on it! People like her are so rare to come by.  I would give her 10 stars if I could! I will recommend her to any friend or family member I know.
I have worked with all three partners of this firm. Their knowledge of the law and reputation are outstanding. They are the go-to firm where I refer all of my medical malpractice cases.

After taking a medication I was prescribed for 3.5 years, that I was only supposed to be on for 12 weeks, I was diagnosed with a neural muscular disorder called Tardive Dyskinesia.  I found out that this disorder was not reversible.
I looked on the internet for a top-rated law firm that took medical malpractice cases.  After being told I have no case by a few firms because of the warning on the medication, I called Mulligan, Banham & Finley Law Firm, and they made an appointment for a consultation.  They took my case, and it was the best call I could have made.
They were very professional and did a lot of research on my disorder and spoke with many top medical professionals about my case.  They were not just interested in the case, they were also interested and cared  about me as a person. Elizabeth Banham (Betsy) even told me about a new medication that was just approved for Tardive Dyskinesia, that my neurologist didn't know about. She told me about the medication knowing that if worked that it could change the outcome of my case, but my health came first.  I would drop into the firm from time to time without an appointment to follow up on my case, and Betsy would always greet me with a hug, and would take the time to discuss the case with me. She drove me to Las Angels see one of the top neurologist in the country. She also flew to San Francisco to depose a witness all on a contingency that we would win.
When we went to the settlement conferences, two of the partners of the firm, Elizabeth Banham, and Brian Finley, went with me for representation.  We settled out of court, and I was very pleased with the results.
I would strongly recommend the law firm of Mulligan, Banham & Finley for anyone that is looking for a top rated medical malpractice attorney.  They truly care about people and not just the money that many other firms were so concerned about, in case they lost.  They stuck out their neck for me and it payed off in the end.

Brian Findley is a gifted advocate for injured persons up and down the State of California. Brian and his firm will handle your case with great care from inception through trial. I would feel more than comfortable recommending Brian and his firm to family and friends.

I refer medical malpractice clients to Brian Findley often as his expertise and reputation in the legal community is second to none. His firm not only tackles some of the most serious injury and malpractice cases in California, they are also advocates for changing local law in favor of consumers. I would not hesitate in referring any family or close friends to Mulligan, Banham and Findley should they ever need such services.

reviews.text:
Zero stars if possible!

I would like to share my ultimately disappointing experience with this firm, and criticize the case selection process that I unfortunately experienced. It is most unfortunate that, after having placed our trust and time in them, my family was abandoned in our most vulnerable time of need.

I initially contacted them because my wife had suffered, as a result of medical negligence, cardiac arrest while having a c-section. I was advised by them to not discuss the matter with any other firms, to stay in touch to provide updates on the case, and that, once my wife's medical records were available, further legal action could commence.

We decided to kept faith, believing that they had our best interest at heart, and thus we followed all their instructions, diligently provided all requested information. In a reversal to their purported hard-working and tireless advocacy mantra, however, the firm decided to drop us and not take our case.

It became evident to us that, because our case would have not provided as much money as they had hoped for, they decided to drop us. I can understand that they reserve the right to take on cases that will provide them an internally predetermined margin--after all, they run a business, not a charity. My problem, however, is with their disingenuous tactic to emotionally string you along, selling themselves as your faithful and indefatigable advocates, just to buy enough time to see how your medical case pans out, all the while consuming YOUR valuable time and betraying your trust. You played us well: shame on you!
reviews.ownerResponse:
I am sorry that you are frustrated and upset about the information we communicated to you regarding your wife's potential lawsuit. Clearly, at the time you contacted us, you and your wife had been through a terrifying experience. Unfortunately, because of California laws, medical malpractice cases are very difficult and expensive to pursue even for well trained, experienced and accomplished attorneys.

At no cost to your family, this is what we did before concluding we were unable to file a lawsuit on your family's behalf:

1. An experienced attorney reviewed all of your voluminous medical records.
2. The records were then reviewed by an experienced board certified physician.
3. Medical research was conducted and cross referenced with the information from the records.
4. Multiple discussions were had with you, seeking additional and updated information and ultimately explaining why we couldn't represent your spouse.
5. We recommended you consult other attorneys to get a second opinion about your potential lawsuit, to see if their analysis was different than ours.

We worked very hard to analyze your potential lawsuit before concluding we could not help you. This decision is not one we made lightly. This information was performed as quickly and competently as possible, and communicated to you many months before the deadline in which you are required to file a lawsuit.

We understand your frustration and we regret that we cannot be of further assistance to you. Worse than the news that we cannot now help you would be the frustration and loss if we naively plowed forward into extensive and stressful litigation, only to lose the case years from now.

MULLIGAN, BANHAM & FINDLEY

Although I pray I never require legal services again, I would not hesitate to reach out to Mr. Joel Bryant and the legal team.  The team represented me through unexpected, heartbreaking events that no one should have to go through.  The many facets of this case included; undue influence, elder isolation, preparation of a witness deposition of the elder abuse/undue influence/isolation,  trust & amendment changes, to name only a few of the challenges. Joel, Jessica and Rob can ONLY be described as professional, genuinely caring,  compassionate and an awesome team!   Look no further, I am confident you are in the best of care with this law firm!!!

When we met Joel Bryant, the situation we were facing was heartbreaking, disgusting and something we never thought would occur in our family.  In a very short time span, a sibling had removed our mother from a retirement community, relocated her out of state, changed legal documents, and cut off all communication between our mother, her family members and financial managers. The sibling and her family accessed 10s of thousands of dollars to their benefit and attempted to change the trust inheritance.  Having no knowledge or experience with the legal system, it was overwhelming and frustrating to say the least.  In reaching out to Joel, he was kind, compassionate, extremely skilled and knowledgeable.  Through his assistance, our mother is now back home, safe and protected from the events that were occurring.   We are so very thankful for Joel’s assistance to protect our mother and the legacy of our father.  Although we never thought our family would face such events, based on the actions of the sibling, we can only assume challenges may again present upon our mother’s passing.  If this occurs, without a doubt, Joel will be the attorney we seek assistance from.

I want to thank the law firm of Green Bryant & French, LLP.  I was very impressed with how well prepared Jessica Wilson and her paralegal, Apryl McLaughlin, were.  Their research of my case allowed them to be on top of all questions asked by the opposing lawyers. Their excellent communication and the overall professionalism was beyond expectation.  They let us know each step of the way what was happening in our case.  Whenever I had questions they were very quick to respond by e-mail or phone. They always answered my questions in a clear and prompt way.  The process was explained and they gave me a good idea of what to expect at every turn. During mediation Jessica and Apryl were ready to counter the arguments of the opposing counsel.  Their logical thinking, anticipation, and assembled evidence all reflected their great preparation that allowed them to represent my family in the best way possible. I always felt that they sincerely cared. I appreciated all the time and effort they put into the case. I can give my highest recommendation to the law firm of Green Bryant & French, LLP.

Robert M.
Joel Bryant and his team served us very well in getting a fair settlement.  They were professional and communicated well.  I appreciate what Joel Bryant did for my family.

I have no reservation in recommending Joel Bryant. As an attorney - brilliant. As a person - honest, kind and genuine. Joel is a stunning example of an attorney with heart who fights for what is right and just.

In 2018, I was in a family dispute that I never would have imagined. I interviewed several attorneys in San Diego. Engaging Joel Bryant and Jessica Wilson was the best decision I could have made. They are smart, strategic, and experienced attorneys. Jessica was a “Rockstar” in depositions. She was so prepared and so tough. Joel was confident and effective in court. His experience is invaluable. We attained the outcome I was hoping for in my case. More importantly, when I was at my most vulnerable, Joel and Jessica both were supportive and accessible. I hope I never have to hire another lawyer, but  I will hire Joel and Jessica again if there ever is a need to do so.

Joel and his team did an amazing job.  Joel and Jessica were easily accessible, exceptionally prepared and kept us informed throughout the case.  We got a great result.  I highly recommend them without reservation.

Joel Bryant and team were just the advocates my family needed to protect my grandmother and her assets from abuse. From start to finish, they were efficient, communicative, kind, and patient, and ensured we all understood as best we could what became a very complex legal situation. Joel fought hard on our behalf to win back the safety of my grandmother, as well as her dignity. To us, that is priceless.

Never in our wildest dreams did we ever think we would find our selves embroiled in a case involving financial elder abuse. By the time we discovered the abuse had occurred, the majority of the life savings had already been fraudulently withdrawn from the account. When we contacted Joel Bryant, he immediately secured a court order and within 2 days was able to freeze a portion of the funds that had been stolen.  This was the start of a process that resulted in a lengthy battle in preserving the rights of a grandmother who was in the early stages of dementia. During situations like this, it takes an emotional toll on everyone and it’s during these times, you need someone you can trust, is extremely competent and is concerned about your welfare at the same time.  We were fortunate to have had Joel and his team work on our case.  Joel and his team worked tirelessly with us and kept us informed of the progress of our case.  We felt 100% confident in what Joel and his team were doing every step of the way.  Joel was an outstanding leader and provided us with in depth insight into the strategy they were going to take to win our case. Every person on Joel’s team had a role and they all performed their job superbly – from Apryl, Mindy and Jessica, they all played a vital role in assisting Joel in resolving our case.  In the end, the trial preparation and presentation was so well organized, the judge granted our judgement including appropriate damages.  To those of you finding yourself in an unfortunate situation such as ours, Joel and his team are the perfect choice to help resolve your case.
One final thought - I for one very rarely, if ever, write reviews.  Not because I shouldn’t but more because in the course of our busy life, we simply don’t take the time to.  I wanted to take the time to write this review, however, because it’s rare to find a talent like Joel and his team who care about their clients and work as hard as they do on your behalf.  More importantly, I know that we have now added more years to the “worry free” life of our loved one with her now knowing that she “does not have to worry about running out of money” (and those were her chosen words exactly). Thanks Joel and team for your hard work.

My adult-dependent daughter was abused in a group home and has suffered from PTSD as well as severe regression in behavior after we removed her from the group home. Because we did not have actual video footage of the abuse happening, we had to resort to a civil lawsuit to attempt to bring justice for our daughter, rather than a criminal lawsuit. We had never been involved in a lawsuit previously and had no idea how the legal system operated or the complications of a case. Joel and his staff were amazing at explaining the complexities of the process, being available to answer questions and support us throughout the process, and give sound advice about which direction to pursue as the case developed. We found him to be genuinely caring and empathetic to people with disabilities and dependent adults that have been mistreated and ensuring that the truth was discovered and justice prevailed for my daughter and our family. Jessica came onto the case 1/2 way through the process, but caught up quickly and walked me through some very emotionally strenuous days and weeks as the case got towards the end and ultimately made a huge difference in our positive outcome. I cannot say enough about the professionalism and caring nature of Apryl as well. She from the beginning was a rock of support emotionally and helped us organize our case in a clear and concise manner, which was critical as we moved into the depth of the case. Under Joel's leadership, this is an amazing legal team that has restored our faith in the justice system and taught us so much. We are truly grateful to have had a team with integrity, kindness, and a solid work ethic supporting us during a very difficult and trying time in our lives. Our case wound up settling before trial and we are now free to move forward with helping our daughter heal from her trauma.

Thank you Bing Bui for everything, my three boys and myself are totally grateful that you took my case. God bless!

This law firm was a real guardian angel for my case! Their professionalism, empathy, and dedication to their clients' well-being are truly commendable. I'm so thankful to have had them by my side! 5 star rating from me all across the board.

I highly recommend Binh Bui. As an attorney myself, I have pretty high standards for legal advice and I have to say that Binh's guidance was competent, strategic and on point. This law firm is amazing they show concern for your case and the call right back..i like that...!!!

Mr. Binh BUI is an outstanding lawyer. He explains everything clearly, responds quickly, and truly cares about his clients. Highly professional, honest.Mr Beinh Bui got me great results without unnecessary stress. I highly recommend him to everyone needing legal help.

Binh Bui was super nice and helpful when I called him to see if he could represent my case. Unfortunately, my case was too small to need legal representation but he still gave me some advice and was super nice. If I do have a larger case, I would reach out to him again!

Binh and his practice have provided top-notch service for my case - the best consultation in a straightforward no-nonsense manner, but also great customer service. Had a great consultation with Binh, he is very knowledgeable, direct and clear, he wants to help you win, and you can tell he cares. Highly recommend working with him! Glad to have found him!!
I was able to find out what I needed to do for some issues where I live. I was given directions where to start and how to handle things for myself. I was grateful for the advice.

Wow, in my one year of going through this madness and many attorneys later attorney Binh; was so patient and kind and let me ask him questions even after knowing he wasn't able to help me.

I was given excellent advice on an upcoming eviction that I am fighting. He was clear and gave easy to understand directions on what I should do. I am very happy with his advice. I will definitely call him again if I need a lawyer.

I contacted  Binh Bui for advice on how to handle a slumlord the information  was helpful in helping me take the steps to resolve the issues I’m having currently now I know how to proceed forward and come to a resolution thank you highly recommend

It took 3 years to finish up my case, but he was able to get the slumlord to pay us $25,000. A win is a win. The only thing that isn’t the best is the communication with his team. It takes a long time to get a response, but I understand they are busy. They are legit and make sure you get paid. He won’t take your case if he knows he won’t win. So if he takes your case expect to get paid. Thanks again Mr Bui.

Navigating legal matters can be overwhelming, but Attorney Binh Bui was an absolute godsend. He patiently walked me through every step, answered all my questions, and made sure I felt comfortable with the process. I'm incredibly grateful for his guidance and professionalism.

This firm clearly knows their stuff. I spoke with Carl, one of the attorneys, and he gave me straightforward advice and practical steps for handling my situation. I've been dealing with a mold issue for over a year, and my landlord has basically ignored it. They just told me to use bleach and paint over it. Carl helped me understand my rights, and I’m relieved my case was taken on. If you're dealing with a similar problem, I definitely recommend them.

Unprofessional and rude! I don’t recommend this to anyone! Contacted this firm for a consultation and the “attorney” named Carl Hancock called late and was offended at the same time? You made me wait and sent me such an ignorant and disrespectful text when you’re at fault and after I sent a respectful text to the assistant ? Unbelievable. What kind of lawyer does that ? A rude and petty one. Let’s not forget how you make money. Know your place. I rather pay for a consultation and receive professional help.

Attorney Binh Bui provided a free consultation. He is so genuinely caring. He listens. He will let you talk. A very good listener. I would like to recommend him to all the people of California! Thank you Attorney Binh!

This law firm has been truly a great help. Atty. Bui cares and not just listen, he acts and make sure everything is well taken care off, it's not hard to talk to him and his team has an excellent way of showing how they could be of help. Thanks Atty. Bui for helping me win my case. You've done such a great job!

I love how their team worked on my case. They guided me all throughout the process, provided me detailed explanation and they really did their best so I can get the justice that I deserved. Kudos to Binh and his team! I definitely recommend their law firm!
Had a great experience from Binh Bui law firm. They were generous with their consultation time and gave me great advice on my case.
Binh was extremely helpful; greatly appreciate his assistance. Highly recommend.

This firm called our case a “2”. I am a fully and permanently disabled veteran facing retaliatory eviction while my ESA dog was dying (and is now dead), and this firm called our case a “2”. Not a serious law firm by any means, just read the reviews and stay far away from them.

Very helpful and comforting which is not common because a lot of law offices that I called are all business and don't want to talk to you unless you pay them. They really listened to me and helped me. Thank you

I'll preface my review like this: The first time I got on the phone and talked to Mr. Bui about my case, I also asked him about the bad reviews on his google and avvo webpage. He told me straight up that they leave all their bad reviews posted as a conscious choice and never delete or fake any reviews. The reason for it being that trust matters to these people, and they'll never pretend to be a perfect law office, since that would be an impossible feat.
Not everyone will have a stellar experience with the office, and that's just a part of doing business. So what you're reading about them is from their actual clients: the good, the bad, and the ugly. I'm gonna use this anonymous account for privacy in my situation, but if you're considering which law office to go with for your tenant case, based on my outcome with the firm, these guys are absolutely legit and worth the risk.

Just a quick rundown of my case: I was dealing with issues at my old apartment ongoing for almost 10 months, before me and my roommate were forced to move out. There was serious infrastructural damage to the walls, windows, and ceiling from a construction crew outside, that made living there a habitability issue. Rain was leaking in through the cracks and pooling on the floors. We had a bedbug and roach issue too that was not getting solved by the landlord. When we contacted Mr. Bui's office, we'd actually been through 2 or 3 lawyers before, and all of them had made us a lot of promises that sounded outlandish or too good to be true. Speaking to Mr. Bui on the phone, he told me they couldn't make any promises or guarantee a specific outcome. I appreciated the transparency from the get-go and it put me more at ease. He also warned me that it could take a long time, even up to 2 years before the case would come to a final decision. We were aware of that going in and prepared for years of delegation. (Just so you know, this is a contingency firm, meaning they don't ask you for anything upfront and only take out a percentage of money if you actually win a settlement.)

We had GOOD luck because it only took us 5 months with the office to hear back from the opposing party that they were willing to settle out of court for a specific amount. We all agreed to the settlement offered, and instead of taking out the 50% on contingency Mr. Bui had originally asked for, the office only took out 40% and let us keep 10% more of the earnings than originally planned.

Everything happened on a much quicker timeline than we thought it would and they were pretty communicative throughout the entire case. While I can't speak for any negative reviewers, I can say from my own experience that I'm definitely glad I went with Mr. Bui instead of another lawyer who gave us a lot of fluff talk to try and convince us to sign on their dotted line. I can't make it clear enough when I say: the outcome of this case changed my life.

Everyone will have their own experience, but please take a chance on this firm if you have a tenant issue with your landlord. You may end up extremely happy that you did!! Less time and money will be wasted on your end, and there could be a potentially life changing result waiting for you.

Peace.

Worst experience-that turned out, due to ending relationship with Bui and Ilya.  My advise is as follows :  Go with big firms even if they do not say they they will do contingency -there are exceptions.  We paid 400 for initial but it was waived and the other partners all agreed and voted to accept case, the new firm that is.  Research everything you are told and question....bad attorney will lie about statutes , and time limits, and say you have a bad case , so take the low offer( just to avoid working it).

UPDATE:  I went with a large firm "PERRY JOHNSON ANDERSON MILLER AND MOSKOWITZ" in Santa Rosa, California

UPDATE 4/2025 -After 3 years and abuse by Binh Bui we successfully settled October 2024 before trial, and got what we wanted .   Mr Bui said we didn't matter, it wasn't worthy and lied because there were 3 insurance companies and not one .  I also received my whole security deposit back after 20 years .   Do not move out if you are not in the wrong, and do your own research and stick up for yourself as there are no Perry Mason moments .  Learned a lot about shady lawyers through Binh.

We worked with Binh Bui over a number of years to deal with a landlord who conducted unlicensed repairs our building, let moisture collect under our flooring due to powerwashing (which resulted in mold and sickness for us), then stole our security deposit and refused to reimburse us for the time we spent away during mold remediation. Yes it took a long time, but they were honest with us about the courts being backed up and how hard it is to prove and pursue landlord/tenant cases. We didn't think this case was ever going to resolve and when it did we were thrilled. Would 10/10 recommend them - just know that these kinds of cases take a long time.

I am a top reviewer on Google maps.
I think some of the negative reviews are from people who lost their cases to Binh Bui, so they take revenge by posting negative reviews.

Attorney Bui is excellent.  In 5 mins he outlined strategies for me to sue a real estate company in California instead of Nevada.  He also cleverly suggested that my daughter file a second lawsuit as she too has a legitimate grievance as well against the real estate company.
I originally had a large law firm advise me.  I seek a second opinion and was referred to Mr. Bui ,whose advice was far better and faster that the other lawyers' advice!!
The attorney has been working my case for over 6 months I’m confident that he will sussesfully win

Worst experience, i told them my case I am a homeowner and every week they had me confused with others asking about my landlord and my lease agreement when i own the home and told them over and over. They are a waste of time sent over 100 emails and his staff is completely incompetent.
Excellent!

Please don’t give this law firm your case. You will end up loosing your time. At first they said we had a case but after we signed the retainer, they were not prompt in giving us updates. We had to constantly be asking them. 7 months after they send the letter to the landlord stating they were representing us and then 2 months after that they said they were no longer representing us because we didn’t have a big enough case.  That is so odd considering they said this after saying we did have a case. We can’t help but to wonder if they got paid off to stop representing us. This is all sketchy and very unprofessional. They have basically waisted about 9 months where we could have gone to a place that actually had our best interest in mind.

Listen to the negative reviews, we just want to warn people and avoid others going through what we have gone.

This law firm is incompetent and is a waste of your time and energy!

This firm took my case on contingency and let me know from the beginning that it could be a lengthy process. I submitted all my proof and answered all the questions they had and yes they had differnt people call me but I understand the whole team was working the case. There was long period of time I didn't hear from them but soon as the negotiations started they contacted me again and kept me informed along the way. They settled my case in my favor and I'm very grateful.

This attorney handled my tenant/landlord case, but there were significant communication lapses. For a year, there was no contact from their office. When I finally reached out for an update, it would take weeks to receive a response, which they merely state that they were still working on your case. After more than a year and a half has passed, I received an email from the law-firm informing me that they were unable to assist further with my legal issues against the property manager/landlord due to a lack of information on this landlord with owns the property (s).

I DO NOT RECOMMEND THIS LAW FIRM AT ALL. I DON'T THINK THE PEOPLE THAT WORK FOR THIS ATTORNEY IS CAPABLE  OFNDOING THERE JOB PROPERLY!!

I WOULD RECEIVE  A PHONE CALL FOR ONE  PERSON AFTER WE HUNG UP ANOTHER ONE WOULD CALL FOR SAME QUESTIONS AS IF HE DIDNT KNOW THE OTHER PERSON CALLED. THIS HAPPEND MORE THAN ONCE. THEY WOULD ALSO ASL ME FOR PICTURES, AND CONVERSATIONS FOR MY CASE OVER AND OVER AND OVER AGAIN AS IF THEY DID NOT RECEIVE  IT. THEY WOULD CALL AND EMAIL ON WEEKENDS TO TELL ME THEY NEVER CALL ON WEEKEND'S AS IF I AM CRAZY!! FINAL DRAW, WAS THE RETAINER DID NOT ADD UP, THEY WANTED 50% OF WHAT EVER I WAS TO WIN. ON TOP ON CONTINGENCY *WHICH WAS AT 0 TO START WITH* AND IT HAD A CLAUSE ABOUT IF THEY NEEDED TO HIRE SOMEONE ELSE AND LIENS IF WE DID NOT PAY A FEE (THATS WAS NOT PRINTED IN CONTRACT) I DID ALL THE FOOT WORK AND WASTED TIME. DO NOT USE THEM , YOU WILL NOT GET WHAT YOUR CASE IS WORTH. CALL AROUND FIRST

Will update after my case, this team (one person?) has been working with my sickness that's causing lag and even helped me realize I possibly have black mold. I hope they take my case after I send evidence, as I'm already going to court soon and the case feels substantial with other factors involved. Even if they don't, I may have to represent myself since it is such a quick process and I've done all of the footwork so far. Hoping for the best.

Mr. Binh has a a whole team  of attorneys working my case!
He took my case on contingency, said he would only take my case if he knows he will win. That’s a very strong stance - he isn’t trying to milk me over a losing case, which means he’s very busy with cases and also that he has integrity.
(It works for me because I wouldn’t want for so many to waste time and energy on a case that has insufficient merit.)
I’m actually causing delays in the case as it turns out. Binh’s team, though, keeps in touch with me and asks me for updates.
I feel I’m in good hands, perhaps the best for this type of personal injury case.

They are outstanding tenant advocates. They won a 5 figure settlement for me in a case I had against a landlord. They specialize in toxic mold, that creates mold biotoxin illness in people when indoor mold is not properly remediated. They're efficient, organized, respectful and give simple, easy to follow guidance for you to assemble your evidence. You can't go wrong hiring this team. They took my case on a contingency agreement.

What a pleasant & professional experience. We called Attorney Jordan Harlan while dealing with deep grief from the wrongful death of our father. Our father was killed in a hit & run as a pedestrian, while he was crossing the street. The man was caught a few days later and has since been out on bail. We did not know what to do or how to navigate the issues being brought  to us by the driver's insurance company. Though  researching  and understanding up-front that based on the driver's limited coverage, our case would not likely produce a worthwile settlement, Jordan still walked with us until the end, guiding us to the best possible outcomes, based  on the circumstances. This kind of compassionate service deserves mentioning. Its good to know that there are still quality  firms out there that are not exclusively focused on if there is a large pay out for them. Jordan & his team are a class act.

reviews.text: I met Jordon as a mock trial professor, and he has acted as a mentor for me in moving to a new area of practice.  Jordon is a dedicated, hard working, and passionate attorney, and I would trust him with any personal injury or employment matter.

I wanted to make sure I write a review for Jordon Harlan after completion of my case as I believe he is absolutely the best attorney in San Diego specially in the areas of employment law and medical malpractice.

As a physician with a complicated and difficult medical legal case, I had interviewed multiple attorneys with very high recommendations and great reviews from various sources such as family members, friends and websites such as superlawyer/yelp. However, after speaking with Jordon, I knew immediately that I only wished for him to take my case.

First of all, Jordon is excellent at communication and extremely efficient at returning phone calls and replying to emails. He is very knowledgeable and knows the employment and insurance/medical malpractice law in great detail. He can explain complicated legal issues with great ease and simplicity and finds solutions for complicated legal issues with a great degree of competence that I found very reassuring throughout my case. He is also very emphatic and trustworthy and listened with great care to my concerns at every step of the way.

During the entire process, Jordon kept me up to date and explained everything to me very clearly.  He is very knowledgeable, dependable, and handled everything in a timely manner. He handled my case with great expertise, care and competence and we achieved an amazing result beyond my expectations.

I would HIGHLY recommend Jordon Harlan without any hesitation to any family member or friend or anyone in need of an attorney.  He is truly in my opinion the best attorney in San Diego when it comes to employment law, insurance and medical malpractice.

Legal problems, especially with injuries and doctors involved, can be a total nightmare, but these guys broke it all down in simple English so I always knew what was happening.
They were very responsive, on top of everything, and you could tell they knew what they were doing. They were extremely respectful about my situation and did everything they could to make sure I got the most out of my case without leaving anything on the table. Every single time I spoke to them, called, or emailed, they responded quick and answered any questions I had. My case felt personal, not just some file on a desk. They fought hard for me, sorted out the messy medical and insurance headaches, and got me a settlement I’m really happy with. Policy limits were paid in full. I’ve even been in contact with them since the case ended, and they’ve given me advice about moving forward.
The best part? Their honesty and communication. No wondering or waiting around, that kind of trust is hard to find.
I know it’s tough deciding whether to hire a lawyer depending on your situation, but I guarantee you Haffner & Morgan are the ones to call if you ever find yourself in an accident. I’m thankful and would refer them to anyone in a heartbeat.

Tim and Christian are honest and trustworthy attorneys with genuine compassion for their clients.  They work incredibly hard on each case to achieve the best possible outcome, often exceeding client expectations.
Wow! These guys are the greatest. If you are unlucky enough to be injured and it's not your fault don't hesitate - call them. They will take care of you like family.

This duo is incredible, and I would recommend them to anyone who has experienced an unfortunate personal injury.

From the very beginning, Haffner & Morgan assured me they would help me recover and support me every step of the way. They consistently followed through. They were always available, kept me informed, and included me in each phase of the process. There was never a time when I couldn’t call, text, or stop by with questions or concerns.

I am deeply grateful for their professionalism, care, and commitment. I truly could not have asked for better support during such a difficult time. They are two extremely friendly, compassionate and hardworking people who want to do whats right when situations are challenging.
Nobody will work harder for you than Christian and Tim. They helped me when it mattered the most and treated me like family. Thank you, Haffner & Morgan!!!
Christian is an honest man, fun to talk to, and aggressive lawyer. He wants to get the best outcome for all his clients. I would not hesitate to recommend him to my closest friends and relatives.

Professional, Sincere, & Honest is what I received from Christian Haffner. My concern with most people is they try to get your business & than once you commit you never hear from them again. A friend recommended Christian Haffner, whom she had used years ago for a motorcycle accident. After our consultation, he confirmed he could take the case. Three long months later, both the HOA and the affected homeowner were finally paid. I’m grateful I reached out to Christian to guide us through this frustrating uphill battle.

Wow, just WOW!! If you don't read all of this review at least take this away...if you are thinking of calling this office, stop thinking & call right now! There is no harm & no risk in just calling & talking to the team at Haffner & Morgan. Big, big shout out to Tim Morgan. That guy has made a profoundly positive impact on my life. More than he will ever truly understand.

My journey started over 2yrs ago after I was involved in a not at fault car accident. My car was totalled & at 1st I didn't suspect anything major injury-wise. However, over the weeks that followed the incident, I started noticing tightness & pains in my neck/shoulders/back and quickly found myself lost & scared as to what to do. Having no experience ever dealing with any sort legal battle, the thought of getting a lawyer intimidated me beyond believe. I felt like pursuing anything was against my moral compass and I didn't want anyone to get hurt in the process. But over time (and with a lot of advice/guidance) I came to understand the role that insurances play and that I was the one that was truly being hurt in this process. And boy am I glad I found this specific office to help & support me. I was told spine surgery was an option immediately after the accident but of course that's the last thing I wanted to do at 29 yrs old. For months fought to heal, strengthen and get back on track naturally...but once every alternative solution failed & the symptoms became unmanageable, I came to realize there wasn't many other options left if I wanted quality of life back. I had not just 1 but 2 separate spine surgeries and it was with the help of this office that I found my amazing surgeon, physical therapy clinic and every bit of help & support throughout my long, strenuous journey. I worked closest with Tim Morgan (what an absolutely fantastic guy - I feel like he played the role of my therapist just as much as my lawyer) but every person I interacted with (Christian, their associated paralegals & every contact they provided for my many different needs) were absolutely phenomenal & reassured me through their words & actions that I was in good care. This place is a wealth of knowledge for not just personal injury cases, but anything within the realm of car accidents, financial & legal needs. Stop thinking & call them now!! You won't regret it.

Thank you, thank you to Tim & the team at Haffner & Morgan!! I would not be where I am today (happy & successfully on track to return to full health) without you guys. I hope I never need similar help again down the road...but if I do (or anyone I know does) I know exactly who I'll be calling.

reviews.text:
I just wanted to take a moment to share my exceptional experience with Kash Legal Personal Injury Attorney. Nobody plans to have their car totaled then suffer a traumatic brain injury along with a bulging disc and neck injury. It was not my fault a car rear ended me focusing into the concrete sidewall of the freeway. Honestly, I'm lucky to be alive. I was able to work for a few months. I am a clinical social and independent contractor for the VA. My company forced me to get Cobra which I could afford Cobra, so I did not have health insurance.
It was a complete nightmare. I was forced go to social services and apply for Medical. This process toke almost three months to get insurance. This surreal I didn't know what I was going to do because I had severe pain and no insurance. Kash Law firm was a lifesaver and without their support I would not have recovered. They provided medical treatment for all my injuries. I was able to get my cat scan, MRI’s, and X rays plus treatment for bulging disc and neck injury.
Throughout the whole process they were polite and friendly and above they were compassionate and showed empathy for what I was going through. This is not something I can for all personal injury attorney these days, many firm don’t care about you as a person. They are just in it for the money – and many are lazy or downright rude. They don’t care about your struggle.  Kash Law was a welcome change from that unhappy standard.
Kash Law is knowledgeable, great communication every step of the way. It’s nice to be heard with patience and empathy during a horrific car accident. They work hardworking and persevering. They helped me to return back to work with a great settlement to buy a new car. If I ever need an attorney again, I will sure use their services. I  will also recommend them to any family or friends of mines who may need a honest, hardworking attorney that has your best interest at heart and will give you excellent service. The end result you will be taking good care of and leave with a financial compensation to help you recover financially and emotionally. Thank you again for an excellent settlement and helping me return back to work.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for trusting us with your life-altering personal injury case. The team at Kash Legal in Chula Vista is dedicated to making an already difficult experience of an accident as easy as possible. If there's ever anything else we can do for you, feel free to reach out to us! Jonathan Kashani, Kash Legal, Chula Vista

reviews.text: The initial Call will tell you everything ! Christian, was extremely rude ! Telling me I am coming at bankruptcy the wrong way by asking the price , had me mind blown ! Everywhere I have called will always give you a price ! The way you Christian came at me was wrong !! Be better for those who are fragile just looking for help !
reviews.ownerResponse:
Hello, we are sorry to hear that you had a negative experience calling our firm. My understanding of your call to our firm is that you were informed that you reside outside of our service area. Our phone representative related this information to you. My understanding is that you were interested in our flat rate pricing. Due to the potential complex nature of bankruptcy cases, we do not offer flat rate pricing.

Our representative mentioned that using flat-rate pricing as the initial criteria for choosing representation could prove more frustrating than alternative approaches. Law firms that offer flat rate prices during an initial call may, and in my opinion are likely to, say prices that may not include the court filing fee, that may not include the costs for dealing with secured debt such as a vehicle loan/lease, may not include additional fees for multiple income sources, may not include additional fees for credit counseling, may not include additional fees for self-employment income, may not include additional fees for complicated employment history, may not include additional costs if you were divorced recently for work related to your MSA, may not include additional costs for more than a fixed number of bank accounts, may not include additional fees for means testing, may not include additional costs for credit reports, Etc. ad infinitum.

Again, we are sorry to hear that you had a bad experience during your first call to our firm. We seek to provide value to everyone who calls us. Our representative attempted to make it clear that you were outside our service area and for that reason had no reason to "sell" you on our service. Everything represented to you after you were informed we could not take you as a client was meant to impart value. Our representative's attempt was to get you from point A to point B without experiencing any potential "bait and switch" experiences along the way.

Best of luck to you in everything you do. Thank you for leaving a review.

reviews.text:
I am a Deaf client of Cowan and was beyond impressed with their exceptional professionalism and dedication throughout my bankruptcy case. From the beginning, they exhibited an unmatched work ethic, diving deep into the complexities of my situation, asking the right tough questions, and paying attention to every detail. Despite the complications of my case, they ensured everything was handled smoothly and efficiently, leading to a successful discharge promptly.

What truly sets them apart is their commitment to accessibility and inclusivity. As a Deaf person, I required accommodations such as an interpreter for meetings with the Trustee, and Cowan went above and beyond to ensure I had the support needed for clear, effective communication. Their responsiveness—whether through email, text, or phone calls via relay service—demonstrated their genuine willingness to accommodate my needs and make the entire process stress-free for me.

Their rates are fair and reasonable and are a testament to the quality of service they provide. If they can deliver such high-quality legal assistance to someone with a disability like myself, I am confident that they can help clients with a wide range of needs. I highly recommend Cowan to anyone looking for a professional, compassionate, and results-driven bankruptcy lawyer.

reviews.text:
These guys mean business. My story is a frustrating one, about a little over a year ago, I was being represented by another law group when I was making even less than what I am today and they were reluctant if not unwilling to proceed with filing a Chapter 7 bankruptcy. Not only that, but precious time was lost, I mean months of time. Time that could have been put into filing, but because they would not touch it until the complete amount of $1,800 was paid. After all that trouble and the full payment later, they STILL would not do it, claiming I did not qualify.

Fast forward months later, this year in March, I did my own research and came across the Cowens. Right off the bat, I got better vibes with them. We had in person meetings, texts, phone calls, all of which showed that they took their profession seriously and invested time and care with their clients. If you are willing to play ball and run with them, they will run with you. I cannot put into better words how satisfied I am with their handling of my case. We navigated the obstacles together and whenever we hit a bump, they took the time and effort to help clear it with me.

Today, I went through the 341 meeting without a hitch thanks to the professionalism and preparation Christian and Steve put into the case. My life is now changing for the better thanks to these two outstanding gentlemen. Thank you so much for the help.

I am absolutely baffled, specially given the 5 stars reviews published here regarding this firm.    A couple of weeks ago I  contacted them  and spoke to a paralegal who said  that her job was to  pass on her intake to an attorney and within 24 hours I would be  advised if they were interested in taking my case.
The issues are as follows:  My optometrist Dr. Novo for over a year failed to tell me that I had a beginning of dry Macular Degeneration (MD);  he also failed to refer me to a specialist who could have/should have started treatment and monitoring my condition.  At my last exam in July, again Dr. Novo failed to mention the condition but the next day a nurse referred me to a retina specialist who advised me that over the past 12-15  months the Macular Degeneration had  progressed from dry to wet and from mild to advanced.  I now have to have shots into the eye once a month.  I contacted this law firm  to look into a possible case of medical malpractice or neglect.
I just received a letter from Thorsness, Bartolotta and McGuire advising me  that they  are declining  to take my case based on Dr. Novo's negligent method of treating  "YOUR FIBROMYALGIA".  I couldn't believe my eyes for I have never suffered from Fibromyalgia first of all,  and if I did, an optometrist would be the last person I would chose to treat it.  Someone at that law firm does not know the difference between "Macular Degeneration" and "Fibromayalgia".  This coming from a firm specializing  in medical malpractice !  No further comment.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Hi Margarita,

We’re sorry for the confusion and frustration caused by the letter you received. We appreciate you taking the time to share your feedback. We’ve reviewed the situation internally to ensure clearer communication going forward.

While we regret that we weren’t able to assist with your potential case, please know that we take every inquiry seriously and strive to handle each one with professionalism and care. We wish you all the best and thank you again for bringing this to our attention.

Vince Bartolotta from the Firm Thorsnes Bartolotta McGuire LLP was referred to me by a friend who is an excellent attorney in his own field.  I needed someone who knew liability law and would help my daughter-in-Law.  He referred me to Mr. Bartolotta.  He was exactly the type of attorneys I was looking for.
My son and grandson were in a collision with a 19 year old who was under the influence of drugs.  My  son and grandson were killed.  Since the 19 year old was the only person left, he came up with a story that blamed my son for the accident.  Upon leaving the hospital claiming a sore knee, he immediately hired an attorney to sue my daughter in law claiming my son caused the accident.  When the police report came back it indicated the 19 year old clearly caused the accident by driving 90 miles per hour on a 45 miles per hour city street.
It might sound like a slam dunk but we needed legal support.  My daughter in law, Lorie, and son made the decision that she would be a stay at home mother.  Why not, her husband was a very healthy hard-working man with a bright future.  They wanted to give their son the best life they could.  Now all she had left was an empty house and no job.
Unfortunately the drive had no assets and a small insurance policy.  That is where Mr.Bartolotta came in.  He and his team worked hard to come up with several approaches to help Lorie and he did.
Here are some of the reasons I liked working with him:
1)	 He gave us his personal phone number and almost always answered it personally.  When he didn’t, he immediately got back to us the same day.
2)	 He never made us feel that we were bothering him or that our questions were dumb.
3)	 He never dodged questions.
4)	 He could always be depended on:
a.	He was always honest and told us what we needed to hear, even though we might not wanted to hear
b.	They came up with several creative ideas to increase the award.  Again, she was a stay-at-home mother and lost everything.
c.	After the terms were agreed to, Mr. Bartolotta told us that if we needed anything else he will help.  That did happen and he did help without asking for a fee.
d.	 After several attempts they somehow got the insurance company to come up with additional money over the policy limits.  I have other attorney friends who still can’t believe that this happened, but it did.  The additional amount he received covered their fee.
e.	Mr. Bartolotta is a nice guy who would work hard to help his clients.
f.	Mr. Bartolotta and his associates never reduced their efforts to help, even when the found out about the driver’s financial condition
I would unconditionally recommend Mr. Bartolotta to any of my family, friends, and anyone who needs honest and hardworking legal representation.

I have known Vince Bartolotta for 15 years and have engaged his firm to represent me in various real estate transactions with the Port of San Diego. The Port is the primary lessor of waterfront properties on the San Diego Bay. He recently represented one of our leases in a very complicated option agreement, in binding mediation, involving a third party developer, the Port of San Diego and City of San Diego. I can truthfully say he and his colleagues did and outstanding job resulting in a very favorable outcome.

reviews.text:
I recently had the pleasure of being helped by Cecilia Brennan of HKM in San Diego. Cecilia was flat out great! I  needed someone to review a separation agreement received from my company to determine if it the terms were fair. I also needed someone to evaluate potential areas of discrimination.

First, Cecilia helped me manage the time I had contracted with HKM by breaking it up into short session so I would get the maximum use of the time I paid for. She then reviewed the document and gave me tips on areas that potentially were areas of discriminations. She also identified sections of the agreement I should redline to insure mutuality. Finally, she  helped me self advocate for a better agreement financially. The end result was a 138% increase in the settlement offer!

I am sure there are other people and companies out there that would charged a high price and in the end left me with nothing to smile about. Cecilia was not one of those people. BTW, besides providing great counsel, she is very calming and nice person too. I highly recommend Cecilia Brennan!
