reviews.text: By the time I realized I was a victim of dental malpractice, the one year statute of limitations was too close for there to be enough time to file a lawsuit. Fortunately I found Mr. Bertsche, who promptly filed an extension that gave me the time needed. Two years have passed since then during which time his professional experience, integrity, and compassion supported me through the discovery process and other procedures with minimal stress. Although he was preparing me to go to trial, he was able to negotiate an adequate settlement via mediation.

I can’t say enough about how grateful I am to Lou for handling my medical malpractice case. From day one, he was a straight shooter—no fluff, no false promises, just the honest truth about what to expect. It was refreshing to have someone lay things out so clearly and be upfront about the challenges we might face, while still fighting hard to get me the best possible outcome.

Lou’s attention to detail was incredible. He prepared for every possible angle of the case and always made sure I understood what was going on. He’s not just a smart lawyer—he really cares about his clients. Anytime I had a question or concern, he took the time to explain things to me in a way that made sense, which really helped put me at ease.

During mediation, Lou was absolutely brilliant. His preparation and strategic thinking were key in settling my case, and I couldn’t be happier with the result. If you want an attorney who is straightforward, honest, and will fight tooth and nail for you, Lou is your guy. I can’t recommend him enough. Thanks for everything, Lou!"

Could not be more happy with Louis Bertsche and his services!
He is extremely knowledgeable, personable, honest and professional.
I would highly recommend him to everyone.

I cannot express my gratitude enough for the exceptional legal representation I received from Louis. From the very beginning, he exhibited a high level of professionalism, expertise, and empathy that immediately put me at ease during an extremely challenging and emotional time.

My case centered around a large prepayment for dental work that was not completed and the portion of work that was completed was not done properly. The office practices were also an issue. Louis displayed an unparalleled commitment to understanding the intricate and mind-numbing details. He listened to the case that I presented, consulted with relevant experts, and navigated through complex legal procedures with skill and precision. His ability to explain legal jargon in a clear and concise manner was truly impressive, making me feel involved and informed every step of the way.

Louis had genuine compassion and concern for my well-being. He took the time to listen to my concerns, answer my questions, and address any anxieties I had about the legal process and the dentist's lack of concern for his wrong-doing. His unwavering support provided me with a sense of comfort, making an otherwise daunting journey much more manageable.

I highly recommend Louis to anyone seeking legal representation. He will go above and beyond to fight for your rights and deliver exceptional results.

******2023
I don't know where to start to describe what an AMAZING experience I had with choosing Louis to represent me after my vehicle accident.

I was car 5 of 5 and none of this was my fault.  I thought by being in the insurance industry it would be a piece of cake to handle this by myself, after all, I handled accident claims on a daily basis, for years.  It wasn't very long after I started trying to organize and work with the other insurance companies by myself and I was a hot mess!!! totally over my head, and A LOT more injured than I realized. I reached out to a couple fellow adjusters (who knew the gravity of my situation) and Loius was recommended by a coworker I hold in very high regard.

I called, spoke with Louis, we set a date to meet and I emailed him the insurance photos, estimate, and records I had so he could review them before meeting at his office. After that 1st call I KNEW this was the attorney I wanted, AND NEEDED, on my side. Meeting Louis and speaking in person just solidified what I already felt, I instantly trusted him to represent me,  to make my best interest HIS priority and to PROTECT me; JUST LIKE HE SAID HE WOULD.

I was hit, I was innocent, I was injured and not myself anymore, I questioned my sanity at times and lived in a constant state of frustration and anxiety. My medical needs weren't being met and I wasn't able to navigate this on my own. Overwhelmed, frustrated, exhausted and aggravated does not begin to describe how I felt. Louis stepped in, took over, and even found medical professional who were experts in the field of my of injuries (mainly PTSD, Traumatic Brain Injury/Acquired Brain Injury) and he saw to it that I WAS taken care of.

Louis was honest, direct,  and communicative about how he planned to handle my case.  He was VERY patient with me even though and I snivled, I cried, I complained, yelled, and then cried more. Louis was very calming and reassuring while going through this entire case handling process. There's no way I could have done this alone.

We were together for about 2½ years before Louis settled my injury case and there is not a day that goes by I am not thankful for Louis. He represented and protected me from those who really tried to take advantage of me, doubt and downplay my injuries.

If you are injured and need someone on YOUR side who will acknowledge your situation, who will protect you, guide you,  prioritize you, and fight for YOUR best interests, then you NEED Louis Bertsche!

Forever Grateful,
Michelle L. Klein

******

I first met Lou in the hospital following a near-fatal motorcycle accident. Lou worked with me throughout my hospital stay to ensure my case progressed. No stones were left unturned. Because of COVID, the case dragged on longer than either of us expected; however, not once did he suggest settling for less than I deserved.

Lou also assisted me in locating the correct financial and trust teams to help me follow my settlement.

I can't ever thank Lou enough for supporting me through the worst period of my life. To this day, I know if I ever need legal advice, I can depend on Lou to be open and honest in response to my questions. I highly recommend Lou Bertsche to everyone I know.

Absolutely surprised by this park and the others across the streets! (Veterans park and Aubrey park) We can't wait till the trains are running again, all the grounds are well kept and plenty of restrooms. We brought our own lunch this time, but now we know that Burger factory restaurant is in the park, so we will eat there next time.
My L4 vertebra was fractured in the pileup. The back injury lawyer made sure my spinal fusion surgery and months of lost wages were entirely paid for.
This drunk driving accident lawyer handled the civil suit perfectly while the criminal case was still ongoing.
The supermarket ignored the spilled oil in aisle four. My slip and fall lawyer obtained the cleaning logs, proving negligence and getting my knee replacement fully funded.
Chemical burns from a job site accident left me scarred. This burn injury lawyer fought aggressively for my pain, suffering, and lost earning capacity.
The helicopter tour ended in a hard landing that fractured my spine. The aviation accident lawyer we retained was incredibly knowledgeable about FAA rules.
Don't let the insurance adjuster bully you. My workers compensation attorney took over all communication and finally got my treatment authorized.
Insurance companies try to downplay concussions. My brain injury attorney brought in medical experts who proved the long-term impact on my cognitive health.
We settled the pain litigation out of court, which saved me the stress of a trial. I was very happy with the amount.
A catastrophic injury requires a lawyer with serious resources. These guys have the budget to hire the best experts.
I was helping a neighbor and the ladder rung snapped. Defective product. Mova Law Group went after the manufacturer. They got me a settlement that covered my time off work.

I was delivering a package when a dog snapped. Chris Mova went after the homeowner's insurance policy. He was professional but firm. I got my lost wages covered and my medical bills paid. He made a bad situation much easier to handle.
A dead branch from a city tree fell on my car while I was driving. Smashed the roof in. Mova Law Group fought the city, proving they knew the tree was dead. They got my car replaced.
I valued how organized everything was handled. Knowing deadlines and documents were managed properly gave me peace of mind while I focused on healing.

I slipped on loose gravel outside a building and felt awkward even reporting it. The lawyer explained things clearly, handled the communication I avoided, and made sure I felt supported. Their patience helped build my confidence.

A dog bite at a local park left me anxious. The lawyer took their time explaining what needed to be done and handled the details. Their communication helped me feel safe and supported from beginning to end.

My accident left me out of work and worried sick. The attorney called every few days just to check how I was feeling. They didn’t just care about the case, they cared about me. That kind of kindness is rare these days.

The lawyer was professional but also human. They didn’t talk over me or make things complicated. They walked me through each part and made sure I was treated fairly. I felt heard and respected the entire time.
Extraordinary follow-up, even before and after the consular appointment.
I received great quality service for my bankruptcy. My discharged got here when they said it will.

Extremely disappointing experience.

This firm significantly delayed my divorce process, missed court dates, and demonstrated poor preparation, issues that are documented in my court records.

By the end of the case, I genuinely questioned whether they were representing me or my ex-wife. She represented herself, yet the firm provided her with guidance on what actions to take. That was completely unacceptable.

This was a waste of both time and money. Everything they did, I could have handled myself, and I believe I would have achieved a better outcome without my ex being given direction along the way.

I would not recommend this attorney or firm.

If I could do it over again, I would choose differently. Take your time, do thorough research, and do not hire an attorney out of panic.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Hello Mr. Tee. Unfortunately we can not identify you as our client. We do not recognize your profile photo nor the description of your case. We are proactive to follow up with our clients, especially when they express an unpleasant experience with our firm. We would like to have the opportunity to discuss your experience with you. If you do not wish to disclose your identify in this application, please contact our office directly so we can identify you; having that you have not contacted us with your complaint prior to posting your review. Cordially, The Law office of Giovanna Gallo.

We have searched your instagram tag and noted your were a previous client under the name of Terrance Scott. Your allegations are very concerning since we finalized your divorce by mutual agreement. Your case is public record and we can see you have had ongoing requests for orders and a restraining order issue after the agreement we had reached in 2024 with opposite party. reviews.text: At first, I was very disappointed with how this began. I was assigned a lawyer who barely communicated with me and never answered my calls or emails. After a couple months, I was told she was leaving (she didn't bother to tell me anything herself) and my case would be handed off to someone else. Disappointed, frustrated, and defeated, I decided to just take my loss. It was already tough being a victim in a car crash. Very fortunate for me, Robert Sagerian was assigned my case. I explained to him the trouble I've gone with the previous lawyer and I was no longer interested with me already being exhausted. Even though he had nothing to do with it, he promised to stick with him and he will still help me. He did PHENOMENAL. I finally felt trust in a lawyer. He went above and beyond. He communicated with me, helped me answer questions I've had. I could've easily given 3 stars due to the beginning but his work was so great, it truly shows this firm is a 5-star firm. Thank you again Robert and Nikki for all your help not only with the accident but with the setback I faced at the beginning.

I had the pleasure of working with Attorney Andrew Goldblatt and case managers Maribel and Azarith. I was hurt badly when someone rear-ended my car while I was stopped on the freeway because of another minor accident.  Unsure of how to handle the situation, I called Jim Iagmin to handle the case.  Jim and his team quickly understood the medical and legal issues.  They worked closely with me and treated me like family throughout the process.  We settled the case in an extremely timely manner for the insurance policy limits.  I could not be happier or more satisfied with the result of the way the case was handled.  I would highly recommend Mr. Iagmin and his team if you find yourself in need of a great personal injury lawyer.

I cannot say enough positively about how Jim Iagmin dealt with my case. I was badly hurt when my bicycle hit a hazard in the road. The city was responsible what happened but we didn't know where to start.
Jim and his team guided us expertly through many complicated legal and medical issues.  Throughout it all, Jim and the team were beyond responsive and caring. Empathetic but definitely business.
It took a few years to sort it all out with the city , but with Jim's hard fought litigation , the city agreed to an excellent settlement.
It was fantastic having Jim and the team behind me.
I felt comfortable on all levels and it was a huge gift to not have to second guess or wonder if things were being done well.  What a huge asset and not only admirable as a lawyer, but as a person that I now value very much.

I strongly recommend Williams Iagmin law firm.  We needed them when I was severely injured when a pickup truck ran me over when I was using the cross walk.  Jim Iagmin was so supportive  at one of our darkest times.  He and his team handled everything for us on the legal side, kept us well informed, made the process so easy for us , and kept driving things to completion in a very chaotic situation.

Riding on the back of a motorcycle, a car pulled out from a stop sign and hit us. We found Jim Iagmin through another motorcycle rider. Jim and his team were great to work with. They helped me get to excellent doctors who were able to explain my injuries and what kind of care I would need in the future. The insurance company low-balled us at first. We filed a lawsuit and several months later, the insurance company offered me the policy limits. I’d strongly recommend Jim and his team.

My personal experience with an auto injury and its recovery has been on going.  Attorney, doctors, pain and loss of normal, routine lifestyle has been affected.  In searching for a legal representative, I was fortunate to be referred to Mr. James Iagmin, LLC.
James remarkable loyalty, understanding and experience always gave me comfort.  Even during difficult times with emotional depositions and sadness, I learned and added to my knowledge of the legal proceedings.  With this support and Jim's team, I successfully was awarded what I felt was an excellent outcome.
I am able to move on.  Mr. Iagmin is a wonderful, skillful personal injury attorney,  I would recommend to anyone.
Sincerely,
Dr. Barbara Young

Jim Iagmin and his team were fantastic to work with. I was hurt when we were hit by a driver who pulled in front of us. Jim and his team helped us obtain the insurance policy limits from the at-fault driver and a notable settlement for us through under-insured motorist insurance. Jim and his team were caring, responsive, and very helpful through the process. I highly recommend Jim!

Jim Iagmin and his team were great to work with. I was hit by a drunk driver and unsure what to do next. Jim helped us obtain the insurance policy limits from the drunk driver and from my under-insured motorist insurance. Jim convinced the hospital to waive its reimbursement claim, which was a real benefit to me. They were dedicated and responsive and really helpful through the process. I strongly recommend Jim and his team!

Jim Iagmin and his team were great.  I suffered a badly broken leg in a motorcycle crash.  Even though the police report found me at fault, Mr. Iagmin settled the case for the insurance policy limits.  Mr. Iagmin and his team were friendly, knowledgeable, and easy to work with.  I highly recommend Mr. Iagmin and his firm to anyone hurt in a motorcycle crash.

Jim Iagmin and his team were great!  I suffered a very serious abdominal injury in a car crash.  I hired Mr. Iagmin and his team after my previous attorneys did not work out (they were very impersonal and high volume).  Mr. Iagmin and his team expertly prepared our case for trial and, as a result, I received an excellent settlement.   Mr. Iagmin and team are highly professional, intelligent, and compassionate.  They went out of their way to find a medical specialist to help me with my ongoing accident-related health issues.  I highly recommend Mr. Iagmin and his firm.

Jim Iagmin and his team were great!  I suffered a serious hand injury when a piece of a hotel’s chandelier fell at my high school dance.  Mr. Iagmin guided us through hard fought litigation and we received an excellent settlement. His team was extremely friendly and I felt comfortable the entire time through the process. I highly recommend Mr. Iagmin and his firm.

Jim Iagmin and his team were great!  I suffered a back injury following a car crash on the freeway.  Mr. Iagmin and Ms. Bouslaugh made a claim and, when one of the insurance companies would not pay, they filed a lawsuit.  They took their time and care every step of the way and took all of the stress I anticipated out of the lawsuit. They treated me like family throughout the process and  we received a great settlement.  I highly recommend Mr. Iagmin and his team to anyone with a serious injury case.

I had a complex case that could have taken several years to resolve. James was able to resolve the case in less than a year and recovered the maximum possible settlement. He is extremely professional and so intelligent that he is always several steps ahead of opposing counsel. He is not only an impressive attorney but also a fantastic human being. Highly recommended!!

Jim Iagmin did an excellent job.  I was hit by an un-insured driver and suffered a serious neck injury.  Jim treated me like family throughout the claims process and helped me get a UM policy limits                                 settlement.  I highly recommend Mr. Iagmin to anyone who has been seriously injured by someone else.

Jim Iagmin did a great job. I suffered an injury when hit by an un-insured driver. Jim and his team guided me through the claims process and helped me get a great settlement. I highly recommend Mr. Iagmin to anyone who has been injured in a car crash.

Jim Iagmin and co-counsel Carree Nahama, did an awesome job.  I suffered a catastrophic injury in an off-road accident.  Mr. Iagmin and Ms. Nahama brought a difficult product liability case.  Throughout the process, they treated me like family and helped me get a great settlement.  I highly recommend Mr. Iagmin and Ms. Nahama to anyone with a serious injury case.

I was lucky enough to be referred to Mr. Iagmin after I suffered injuries in an auto accident.  He and his team are thorough, professional, patient, organized, dedicated, supportive, informative, and all around outstanding!  I never felt like I was just another client or a burden, and Mr. Iagmin tailored his approach to my needs, as well as my personality.  That's a gift you just don't see often anymore.  I couldn't be more pleased with his handling of my case and the settlement he orchestrated for me.  I will be forever grateful!

Mr. Iagmin and his team did an outstanding job!  I suffered a Traumatic Brain Injury when my car was struck from behind by a large truck.  Mr. Iagmin was very familiar with my type of injury and understood how it affected my family and me.  He made sure I received the proper care and medical assistance throughout all my struggles. Mr. Iagmin and his team worked tirelessly to get us a great settlement! Even after the settlement was complete, Mr. Iagmin continued to check-in with my family and me to ensure we were doing okay. He treated us as if we were his family!

The Hulburt Law Firm represented my family after a tragic fatal roadway incident in San Diego. They handled communications with two auto insurance companies, obtained the police report, and evaluated whether any claims against the city or state were possible. Their firm was compassionate and sensitive towards our family during the entire time they helped us. Their guidance was clear and professional. We appreciated their straightforward communication and would highly recommend them to anyone needing help with an automotive liability matter.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you Diane, we so appreciate your kind review.

reviews.text:
Compassionate, trustworthy, and fights for justice — Connor is the real deal!”

Connor was the lead attorney in our case, and we are so thankful we found him. From the very first meeting, I could tell he truly cared about us and wanted justice for our family. Once we hired him, everything went smoothly — I never felt stressed because I knew we could completely trust him.

Connor is not only a very trustworthy attorney, but someone who genuinely cares for his clients. We didn’t just hire an attorney; we built a relationship with someone who became a true blessing to our family. I highly recommend Connor to anyone looking for an attorney who will fight for justice and stand by you every step of the way.

reviews.text:
Connor at Hulburt Law Firm APC is an amazing and trustworthy attorney! From the very first meeting, he made it all about us — genuinely caring about how we were doing. Whenever we had questions or felt unsure, Connor always took the time to explain things clearly and make sure we understood every step.

He worked so hard on our case and always put our family’s best interests first. Connor isn’t just an attorney you can trust — he’s someone who truly cares and builds real relationships with his clients.

After our son was injured as a pedestrian, we didn’t know where to turn or what attorney to hire, but finding Connor was truly a blessing. We are so grateful for his compassion, dedication, and support throughout the entire process.

I had Conor work on my case and he was great. His concern for me and my family to get the best option was his priority. He pays attention to detail, follows up, communication is great also. I was very happy working with Conor and would recommend him to anyone. With him, your in good hands.

reviews.text: I endorse this firm. What particularly impressed me was they are personable, down to earth people, creative problem-solvers, they are articulate and can provide ongoing continuous support.

I cannot thank Michael Rott enough for everything he did for me during my workers’ compensation case. When I was injured and overwhelmed, Michael stepped in and immediately made me feel supported and protected. He truly listened to me, treated me with respect, and fought for me every step of the way. He explained everything clearly, kept me informed, and never made me feel like just another case. During one of the most stressful times of my life, Michael gave me peace of mind and confidence that I wasn’t alone. His dedication, compassion, and determination made all the difference in my outcome. I am beyond grateful for his hard work and highly recommend him to anyone who needs a strong, caring workers’ comp attorney.

Sincerely,
Charles Cooper.

My only regret in this review is that I'm not able to give these lovely people 10 or more stars!
I was referred to Hiden, Rott & Oertle by our family attorney, after I was injured in a freak work accident, suffering a fractured skull, broken bones, a TBI(brain bleed) and short term memory issues among MANY other things. I was told these were the people that understood workplace injuries, especially Brain injuries. From the very beginning, Mr. Hiden and Mr. Rott, as well as paralegal Diana Ruvalcaba were always there to help me through every single step of this difficult process. Every single interaction I had with them was top notch!
Whether I called, emailed or texted, they were always immediately responsive - and never treated me as if I was being  an annoying worry wart with my incessant questions! With the short term memory problems I've had since my accident, I'm sure that I asked them the same questions repeatedly! Most importantly, they were able to make sure that I received the top notch medical care I now know I needed then and will need in the future.
Your employer's insurer is only interested in getting rid of their liability (you) as quickly as they can and at as little cost to them as possible. Don't believe for even one second that they are there to help you or even care about you a little bit. They do not!
Nobody from Hiden, Rott & Oertle ever made me a  single outlandish promise like the firms you see in flashy advertisements every day. Don't go to an attorney because of their advertisements. Go to an attorney that doesnt have to advertise! A proven reputation is far better than expensive commercials, Gold chains and, big fake smiles. The fine attorneys at Hiden, Rott & Oertle are simply the best! The quiet confidence that they exude makes you realize that you made the right choice by retaining them. At the end of the day, they delivered a settlement far more generous than I ever expected or imagined. I'm now confident that I'll never worry about my future medical care or any of my other needs. Thank You!!

David Hiden’s responsiveness and efficiency while quickly closing my case is appreciated and has helped offer me some peace of mind during a difficult time. Thank you David, for helping lift me up when I was feeling knocked down. Ya done good.

I spoke to this firm about a sexual assault lawsuit where I have a vagina injury.
The attorney I spoke to asked me inappropriate questions.

This firm is racist. The lawyer I spoke to asked what race I was and the race of the person I’m suing. I  said that I am half black half white. He then asked me what race I looked and said if I look whiter it would be better for me in a trial. He also said that the only thing that would matter is who the jury likes more.

I got a referral to Hiden, Rott & Oertle from my union for a work comp case and it was one of my luckiest days ever.

Attorney, Brian Dougherty represented me and was stellar throughout. His communication is beyond amazing. I could text him directly and he would respond with an hour if not right away. If we needed to talk, he always made time for it. His assistant is also on top of everything and responds to questions and requests very promptly.

Work comp is a labyrinth of laws and without good guidance, you can be lost for a long time. I can say that Mr. Dougherty and Hiden, Rott & Oertle got me the best medical care, a great surgeon and a fair settlement. I know this better than to be expected result because a co-worker was injured about a month after me with a similar shoulder injury. He had no representation and I can say, conclusively, my treatement was better, my result better and my case settled before his. Without Mr. Dougherty's help none of this would have been the case.

I cannot heap enough praise on Brian Dougherty and Hiden, Rott & Oertle. My deepest grattitude for their hard work on my behalf.

My wife had a challenging case involving a closed head traumatic brain injury. Not just any attorney was up to the task, as brain injury cases require significant experience from the lawyer. We found that lawyer in Michael Rott at Hiden, Rott & Oertle.
We faced many challenges, and the defendants were beyond stubborn, but Mr. Rott was unrelenting in our case and tried every strategy possible to get us to a settlement worthy of the injuries suffered.
Most importantly, Mr Rott and his entire firm cared about us and our family, going out of his way to make sure we were happy and that our concerns were heard. In the end, we got a fair settlement and can now move on with our lives. We highly recommend Michael Rott!

Hiring Mr. Michael Rott was the best decision I have made in my life. I had a catastrophic work accident. And God brought Mr. Rott into my life to help me with my worker's comp case.  Mr. Rott's professionalism, work ethic,  and dedication towards helping his clients is second to none. Mr. Rott was there for me every step of the way. He help me get all the medical equipment, and treatment I need it. Mr. Rott is very caring, responsible, and respectful with his clients.  He will answer your calls, text messages and emails in a very fast manner. Mr. Rott is a hard worker  and a fighter for his clients and I mean that. If you want an attorney that really fights for the injured worker hire Mr. Michael Rott. He will settle your case fast. He's the best attorney in California.

This guy Alex who is answering the phone has very poor communication skills. I have been a client of this law firm 3 times and the way this guy refused to even listen what I had to say was extremely unprofessional and rude. Totally disrespectful person should not be working for a law firm.

I've injured at work and became disable and I was extremely disappointed and very unhappy  with the service I've received.
I had a terrible experience with Mr. Matt Blancato and workers compensation lawyers were gossiping I was really frustrated to find out there were hidden things (EDD, SSDI<SSI)
it felt dishonest and misleading every time provided not clear information poor communication.
Definitely conflicting I received an incorrect settlement and the whole process was confusing. I would not recommend this law firm to anyone. it was bad!
reviews.ownerResponse:
Imam,
We are truly sorry to read that you had a terrible experience with Matt Blancato, who is no longer a member of our law firm. Please call our office 619.296.5884 and ask to speak to Michael Rott or David Hiden to assist you further. Thank you for the opportunity to serve you better.

reviews.text: Michael Rott is very knowledgeable and he accomplished a daunting task in turning my case around from the negligence and incompetence of my previous attorney. This was a long, arduous fight and my case was resolved bringing me what I truly deserved.

If you need a legal team on your side, this is who you would want to go with.  Mr. Oertle is superb at what he does.  Mr. Oertle will go out of his way to make sure that your legal needs are met.  I had contacted six law firm prior, and all were quick to dismiss me because I was not the "easy money injury case."  My case was complicated with my car being in the shop since February of 2022, and it is still in the shop today, November 17, 2023.  Mr. Oertle gave me advise and suggestions on how to handle my insurance company.  To make the long story short, Mr. Oertle was able to help me receive the maximum payout for my vehicle.  There are too many lawyers out there that only sees how much they can make on a case.  Mr. Oertle does not in this category at all.  You do not know what a true lawyer is until you get to talk to Mr. Oertle.  Thank you, Hiden, Rott & Oertle.

My previous lawyer, Beach Cities Legal was unable to get my case accepted and I was getting no medical treatment.
Michael was referred to me and for that I will be forever grateful.
Soon after taking my case my claim was accepted and I got the much needed medical attention. I had his cell phone number and he always answered my calls. He was Leo attended most of my dr appointments.
We went from case denied to $2.5 mil
This firm is amazing
Brian was very knowledgeable and was able to give me the information I needed. He was very polite as well.

This firm came highly recommended by another highly reputable firm. My experience with Matt Blancato and David Hiden has been exceptional. They won our case with the highest possible settlement. They took such care and answered every question and email thoroughly and promptly. I am grateful for their service and trust them completely.

Matt Blancato handled my case with Work Comp.  Upon hire, he immediately got the proper tests scheduled, (which I had been denied)and revealed a significant injury.  Every time I emailed him, he ALWAYS got back to me in less than 15 minutes. Every time.  My questions, regardless of nature, were always answered thoroughly. I felt well represented, safe and always as if my case was a priority.   I highly recommend Matt if you want to experience how attorneys should be.

I highly recommend Matthew Blancato. Matthew was always professional and available to answer my questions and emails.
He helped me through the travesty of a broken system that is Worker’s Compensation. He suggested fantastic, caring orthopedic surgeons, Dr. David Fabi/Dr. Michael Muldoon, & brought a difficult case to a fair settlement. I now will be able to pay for the medical care denied by the insurance company. He handled everything efficiently and professionally. I highly recommend this attorney.

Mr. Blancato was highly recommended to me by one of his clients following a work injury. My case was dealt with in a professional and timely manner   and Matthew communicated with me regularly and took care of everything related to my case. He fought for me and got me a very fair settlement. Thank to Matthew and his team for their hard work.

I highly recommend Matthew Blancato and his team for representation and advice. Matthew was always highly professional and always available to answer my questions and emails.
He helped me with my Worker’s Compensation case and settlement. I received better medical care because of his representation and ultimately, was able to reach a fair and ethical settlement with the insurance company. He handled everything efficiently and professionally. I couldn’t have done it without his help. I highly recommend this attorney.

Very unsatisfied with my in google search results. I searched for a Social Security disability attorney and this law firms name was displayed on the top as an ad and when I called to inquire for a Social Security disability claim the secretary immediately put me on hold and then called me back after I hung up to say that they do not participate in social security claims but he could text me a referral. Thanks google for wasting my time and life force energy!

An Unbelievable Lawyer and an Unbelievable Result!
5-lawyers turned down my husbands catastrophic work comp case.  It is a miracle that Attorney, Michael Rott took on this case.

The case was denied.  The general contractor told his insurance company that he didnt know anything about my husbands employment; didnt know anything about my husbands injury; and that he didnt even know anything about the construction job.
I can genuinely tell you that Mr. Rott did what other lawyers were unable to do.  Mr. Rott proved that this general contractor was responsible for my husbands injuries which have left him bedbound and in a vegetative state.
After 3-depositions and several Court hearings, Mr. Rott was able to settle my husbands case for $5 Million Dollars which will then be structured into nearly double that amount of money.  Thanks to Mr. Rotts vision and unbelievable lawyering, my husbands medical care will be taken care of for the rest of his life; and my children and I will no longer worry about money.

Great treatment and attention from start to finish. Very professional and informative from the start to make sure everything gets handled correctly. could not have hoped for a more successful outcome/result of my case and the wait was handled and the service offered and executed.
My direct contact and lawyer handling the case, Matt Blancato, was extremely profesional, never left any detail would reiterate on asking any ore questions or concerns i had, bringing up questions I might have or things that i might possibly forgotten. Was available for when I had questions whether it was a phone call or text, no matter the level of importance, always would respond.
The attention made the whole experience exceptional.
BRIAN DOUGHERTY IS A SUPREME AND ULTIMATE PROFESSIONAL..
I love the way they communicate with the client, give good advice, and all around professionalism.  I would recommend the company and use them again.
David Hiden is a pleasure to work with. Honest and very easy to contact. Thank you.
Good customer service

I was referred to them by my union for a work comp case.
I was assigned to Mr. J. Ring.
I have since concluded my case. I am very satisfied with how everything was handled.
The only real issue is access to the office. Parking is a nightmare.

I was referred to this firm by my union. What a horror show! I have nerve damage in my feet and hands, Drs.think it was caused by exposure to toxins at work. I provided all my medical records to this firm. (more on that later) The first attorney quit, got a new one, he quit. Got another attorney, she quit, another attorney and she quit. I called and asked what was going on. A few days later I get a call from one of the partners who told me he was personally going to handle my case. He lied. My case was given to an attorney who said settle for 2k and go away. I said after all the time an energy I had invested I wanted to see the judge as I was assured by previous attorneys that I had a good case. The last attorney didn’t answer questions and didn’t know the facts of my case. Someone had lost my file with blood tests that showed the toxins. I showed him a copy outside the courtroom. It was obvious he had never seen them before. The insurance company had much better attorneys. I lost my claim.
ps I left out the part when these “experts” filed on an insurance company that had gone out of business!
A total cluster flux!
A horrible experience
If you listen to there phone message about all the bad things law firms do and they claim they don’t do that. A TOTAL LIE!

David V Hiden  gave me quick and concise information about a case that I was going to purse. I was not informed enough on all the aspects of this case. He provided clear and concise information. That saved me time and financial burden .  They contacted be quickly, so I also want to thank the receptionist that I assumed scrolled through the mornings e-mail to see new cases. Very professional, no one wants to go through litigation but If you had to I would use David V Hiden. Straight to the point. Its a comfort to know, like insurance your covered.

Thanks Again Mr Hiden

Dr. Ring made this very stressful process very easy and comfortable and professional. He explained everything to me and was very quick to respond when I had any questions or concerns and helped me. I would highly recommend him.

This law firm was such a pleasure to work with.  Michael Rott and Jonathan Ring were so professional and at the same time showed me a great deal of compassion.  They did exactly what they said they would do and in a very timely manner.  I would highly recommend this firm.

Attorney Matthew Blancato is awesome. This firm is so lucky to have Mr. Blancato he really represents this firm well. He's working with my workmans comp situation, and I'm so thankful. He really treats me like I'm his only client. Highly recommend this awesome man to everyone out that may need a helping hand. Thank you so much Mr. Blancato.

I’ve talked to dozens of lawyers in metro Detroit and San Diego regarding a complex legal issue. David Hiden was hands down one of the most competent, intelligent, knowledgeable, sharpest and down to earth lawyer I had the pleasure of talking to, I felt like I was getting advice from a family member/friend.

Hiden was ten steps ahead of everyone else and told me exactly what would happen and the process, he will absolutely do everything he can to help his clients.

San Diego is very lucky to have David Hiden as an attorney, he is the real deal.

Keep it up David!

My husband was in a work related injury Jan 2018. His case has settled Nov 2018. This lawyers office made history. No workmans comp case has EVER been settled under 12 months. They worked so hard for my husband  and family. If you do not choose this office to represent you in your situation. I wish you luck. There is no better lawyers the Hiden Rott & Oertle. Thank you.

For very rude receptionist that turns away million dollar clients. I hope when you pull your zipper up, when your finished  it 's worth the millions you lost!
and you can afford your antibiotics afterwards! Sa La Via

The best experience with an attorney, Dave Hiden helped me through a tough time dealing with a work injury. I was getting the run around before I hired them. They took care of everything after that. Sent me to an amazing Doctor. I will forever be grateful.

I spoke with Dave Hiden a couple of weeks ago. I had some concerns I wanted to inquire about. He not only took the time to help me though I hadn't even retained him. He just directed me with suggestions and also helped me by writing an email that I could use for reference. He was amazing, thoughtful and followed up.  He did not have to do that. It shows me a lot about his character and this firm.  Thank you Dave.

Jen

Our family will always be grateful to CaseyGerry for guiding us through one of the most devastating times of our lives following our daughter’s fatal bicycle accident. Navigating the legal system while grieving felt overwhelming, but from the very beginning, they handled our case with professionalism, compassion, and integrity.

Attorney Howie Bruno and investigator Paul Francavilla were with us every single step of the way. They were patient in explaining the process, responsive to our questions, and always made us feel like we were their priority. Their steady guidance and dedication ultimately led to a settlement that was agreeable to all parties.

What truly sets CaseyGerry apart is that they genuinely put their clients first. We never felt like just another case — we felt supported, heard, and cared for during an incredibly painful chapter of our lives.

We highly recommend CaseyGerry to anyone in need of experienced, compassionate personal injury representation.

We highly recommend the Casey Gerry Personal Injury Lawyers, which specializes in personal

injury cases. We were well represented by Robert Francavilla, managing attorney and partner;

Jason Evans, partner; Zachary Wallace, and investigator Paul Francavilla, along with a highly

experienced paralegal team. The legal case from discovery, deposition, and mediation was a

well organized process.   We were well prepared, because the attorneys kept us informed of the

status and progress of the case.  They are very professional, competent, and friendly to work

with. The firm has received numerous awards and recognition, including lawyer of the year, and

has been in the San Diego area since 1947.  We are very well pleased with the monetary

settlement and results of the case.

Highly recommend.

Our lawyer (Eric) with CaseyGerry was absolutely amazing from the very beginning until the very end. He always showed concern and compassion and understood our needs. Never pushy, always willing to help. The firm as a whole is absolutely amazing too!! Every single paralegal (Andy and Sonia) was phenomenal! We even connected with Dave (D3) who you can tell leads by example, he was beyond amazing too!! We had so much support and constant communication with them. I most definitely recommend CaseyGerry to everyone! Thank you all so very very much!!!

reviews.text:
Thank you, Kyle, Jason, David, and the entire Casey Gerry team.  I have nothing but great admiration, trust and gratitude for you and the firm throughout the lengthy legal process which is consistent with an unprovoked dog attack.  Please do not hesitate to reach out if ever I could offer another personal injury client a heartfelt and honest review attesting to CG Law’s sincerity, professionalism, and true concern expressed for both me and my dog when other firms quickly hung up the phone…..

reviews.ownerResponse: We deeply appreciate your kind words and trust in our team during this challenging time. It's fantastic to know you felt supported and understood throughout the process. Offering assistance beyond legal representation is a cornerstone of our practice, and your willingness to recommend us means so much. Wishing you and your dog all the best moving forward!

reviews.text:
I was referred to Casey Gerry by a dear friend of mine, back in ‘22 when my arm was severely broken - before that, I hadn’t had much experience with injury attorneys.

I reached out to them in a panic, and within days they sent a team member to my house to check on me, talk me through it, and help me document everything that had happened to date. I was told that things could take a while - even years, and they were right.

During that long recovery, I was involved in a second life altering auto accident - this was 8 months post surgery of my broken arm. I immediately called Casey Gerry, and their team once again jumped into action without hesitation, and assured me that they would help me in all ways possible, and to just focus on my recovery. I’ll never forget the beautiful flowers they sent to my hospital room! Such a thoughtful gesture at such a painful time.

It’s now been almost 3 years, and throughout this journey I’ve worked with many members of the Casey Gerry team. Every single one has been so kind, patient, and incredibly supportive. I especially want to acknowledge Sonia Estrada, the paralegal who’s been working with me the longest. She is one of my real life guardian angels - warm, motherly, and always ready with a hug and heartfelt encouragement, when I’ve needed it the most!
Robert Francavilla and David Casey III are outstanding attorneys. In the moments when the processes have felt overwhelming, they’ve offered wisdom, strength and reassurance that helped me keep going.

This has been one of the most difficult chapters of my life, but I’m endlessly grateful that my friend pointed me in the direction of Casey Gerry. I couldn’t have asked for a more dedicated and compassionate legal team.

reviews.text:
I can’t say enough good things about this firm. My case was not a high dollar case and a slip and fall at that. So it was difficult to even find anyone who would take what happened to me seriously. But David Casey III listened to me. He is a young family man and full of positivity and compassion. He always made time to speak with me as soon as he could answer my call. Bedside manner goes a really long way with me, and he never made me feel devalued or insignificant. He checked with me about everything and always left me in the driver seat, but had my back by giving me his honest opinion, regardless of his own personal take on things. I’m truly grateful to him and his staff. Especially Sonia, who would always call me “Sweetheart” which I thought was super endearing. She did a lot and was patient even when I couldn’t figure out how to electronically sign something or took too long to answer her emails lol.  We don’t get enough kindness like that these days with everybody being so ridiculously and politically “correct.“ But I believe in being simply correct and treating people right.
I would recommend them to anyone, and in the end, I got a better settlement than I originally expected, and at least felt like my pain and suffering was compensated adequately in the end. What I loved was that they were willing to go to trial for me even if I decided not to settle. They had my back the whole way through….Yes, you have to share your settlement, but I know that Casey Gerry went above and beyond to earn it. I would’ve gotten nothing without them…a class act firm with great people who care!
Thanks David, Sonia and staff. God bless! Heather M.

It means everything to us that you felt cared for and valued throughout your journey. Your kind words empower us to continuously be there for our clients, no matter the size of the case. Thank you for trusting us to have your back and for your wonderful recommendation!

reviews.text: Having served as a personal injury attorney and mediator in San Diego for 53 years, I would like to offer my highest recommendation for Robert Francavilla, of Casey Gerry, to the San Diego community. reviews.text: My wife and I were struck by a reckless driver at a stop light near our home in San Diego.  We knew Casey Gerry through a friend in the legal community. Jason was very thoughtful when listening to us.  He asked questions that helped him shape a strategy to best advocate for us.  Jason always treated us with empathy about the injuries we sustained.  He was very honest and set us at ease that we didn’t have anything to fear.  He stood by us every step of the way, was a fierce champion, and had what many lack, a passion in fighting for us.  As a former Marine I can tell who I want by my side when I’m on the battlefield, Jason and the Casey Gerry firm!  I without question recommend Jason Evans and the Casey Gerry law firm to anyone with a personal injury case.

reviews.text:
I vividly remember the day we found David and his father when we felt completely overwhelmed and helpless. They welcomed us into a large room in their office, listening patiently as we explained our situation. Their calm demeanor and reassuring smiles immediately gave us a sense of comfort. From that very moment, we knew we had found the right team.
Our journey together spanned several years. What started as a situation without hope ultimately reached a satisfying resolution. We encountered many challenging times along the way, and I remember some particularly difficult conversations. Since English is not my husband’s and my first language, legal terminology was often unfamiliar to us. But David, his father, and their entire team always took the time to explain everything in simple terms until we fully understood. I especially recall David’s father patiently explaining details to us in his office, his reassuring smile easing our anxieties and making us feel secure.
The case itself was already painful enough without the added stress of litigation, yet their professionalism went beyond mere legal expertise. They were attentive to our emotional needs, displaying genuine empathy and understanding throughout the process. Whenever we had concerns, they offered not only clear answers but also addressed any worries we had, no matter how small. Now that everything is resolved, I am incredibly grateful for their dedication and expertise. They explained complex legal matters in terms we could grasp, always staying responsive, and even showing care for our emotional well-being. When I thanked David for all he’d done, he simply said this was why he chose to be a lawyer—to help families like ours. I was deeply moved by this, and I’m seriously considering encouraging my daughter to one day become a lawyer as compassionate and skilled as they are.
They didn’t just help me as an individual, they helped our entire family. And in doing so, they assist countless families like ours. Through this experience, they became more than just our attorneys; they felt like friends, witnessing our journey, growing with us, and standing by our side. I struggle to fully express our gratitude; they did far more for us than we could have ever imagined.
My heartfelt thanks will always remain with them, and I wish them every happiness and success. I want to specifically mention David S. Casey III, Sonia Estrada, Robert J. Francavilla, David S. Casey, Jr., and Jay Paulino. (Please let me know if I’ve missed anyone.)
Thank you for everything. We will carry this gratitude with us forever.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for sharing your heartfelt review with us. We are truly grateful for your kind words and are so pleased to hear that our team was able to provide the support and guidance you needed during such a challenging time. It means a lot to us that you felt comfortable and understood throughout the process. Our commitment is to treat every client with compassion and professionalism, and it's wonderful to know that we made a positive impact on your family's journey. We appreciate you taking the time to acknowledge the team's efforts, and we wish you and your family continuous happiness and success in the future. Thank you again for your trust in us.

reviews.text: Highly recommend!! Late 2022, I was in my first ever accident involving an Amazon delivery van. Not knowing a single thing about injury law or insurance I was struggling trying to navigate throughout the process. I was completely stressed out and was beginning to loose hair. By chance I was able to connect with Michael and immediately had him represent my case. Michael and Christina were quick to get things running. When my doctors were overbooked and I couldn't get timely appointments they were able to get me even better medical services immediately! They made everything a breeze. After passing over my initial information everything was handled digitally and required almost zero input on my end. They were clear, detailed, methodical, and made sure I understood the entire process. No confusion, hounding, or disagreements. Everything they suggested was for the best of me!! This allowed me to focus on healing and getting back my pre-accident health/mobility. I was more than happy with my settlement and finally am getting back to throwing balls for my dog, skiing, and catching fish!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you Mo.  It was a pleasure helping you and thank you for trusting us with your case.

reviews.text: Michael Goldfadden is by far one of the top personal injury attorneys in the state.  Knowledgeable, professional, diligent, caring, and kind, he works extremely hard for the best possible resolution to a case.  My wife and I were involved in an automobile accident wherein we were hit from behind by an inattentive driver.  Both she and I suffered injuries that required prolonged medical care.  The driver’s insurance company (Progressive) did not want to pay.  They fought us every step of the way, in spite of the fact we could prove damages and that their client was to blame.  To make matters worse, when we saw that the insurance company was going to be uncooperative, we hired an attorney who ended up retiring on us in the middle of our case.  My wife and I searched for an attorney that would be willing to take up where the first attorney had left off but were unsuccessful for several months.  Finally, we ran across Michael.  Michael was great from the beginning.  He agreed to take the case when no one else would.  He dug deep and fought diligently against the insurance company and got them to pay the entire policy limit.  Our damages exceeded the driver’s policy limit however, and Michael was able to obtain a full recovery though our uninsured / underinsured motorist insurance.  Not only that, but Michael was able to negotiate down the medical liens that we had accumulated due to our injuries, something that he obtained no financial compensation for, thereby allowing us to pocket money in compensation for our pain and suffering. I would thoroughly recommend him to anyone unfortunate enough to suffer an accident.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank you so much for sharing your experience! We know how tough it was for you and your wife—not just dealing with injuries, but also battling an insurance company that refused to do the right thing. And to have your first attorney retire in the middle of it all? That’s beyond frustrating.

We’re really glad we could step in and fight for you, especially after you had been searching for help for so long. Getting you the full policy limit and making sure you walked away with as much compensation as possible was exactly what you deserved. We know how much this case meant to you, and it means the world to us that we could make a difference.

Thank you for trusting us and for the amazing recommendation. If you ever need anything, we’re always here. Wishing you and your wife all the best!

-Goldfaden Benson APC

reviews.text: Started off with a low ball couple thousand settlement with the promise of all medical bills being paid. After a year the insurance company started ignoring my requests to pay medical bills. Some law firms I contacted said I didn't have a case due to a voice recording settlement. Blake at De Santis law firm took the case on a contingency basis and had not only re-opened the settlement, but managed to increase my take home 17 fold, multiple tens of thousands! He secured an MRI (which my PCP wouldn't order) which turned to out to be instrumental in moving the case forward. I took the MRI to an orthopedist for an evaluation which illuminated injuries sustained from the MVA. He also negotiated many of the medical bills down substantially, thereby increasing the amount of take home pay. He did all this for relatively low lawyer fee percentage as well (low end of the usual 33% to 40% range.)
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for taking the time to share your experience. At De Santis Law Center, we don’t accept low-ball offers or closed doors, and we work hard to maximize our clients’ recovery while keeping fees fair. If anyone reading this feels stuck or unheard after an accident, we’re always happy to take a look and help.

I had a great experience working with Sexton Law Firm in Chula Vista. They were very professional and kept me informed with updates throughout my case. The paralegal, Selena Rios Coleman, was especially helpful and professional, staying in touch and responding as quickly as possible whenever I had questions.

Mr. James Sexton was also very professional and did a phenomenal job handling my case. Their communication, professionalism, and support made the entire process much easier. I highly recommend Sexton Law Firm to anyone needing help with a workers’ compensation injury case.

I first met attorney Andrew Sexton in 2019 when he guided a friend of mine through a difficult financial situation. My friend spoke so highly of him that when we decided to establish a trust, we immediately turned to Andrew.

Working with him on such an important matter has been an absolute pleasure. His calm demeanor, deep expertise in trust and estate law, and steady confidence put us at ease from the start. He carefully listened to our needs and requests, thoughtfully incorporating each one into our trust documents.

Our revisions were extensive, including the added complexity of creating a secondary trust within our primary trust. Andrew handled every detail seamlessly and ultimately crafted a beautifully structured trust that reflected everything we hoped for - often understanding our intentions even when we struggled to articulate them clearly ourselves.

His follow-up was impeccable: always available when needed, yet never rushing us. We were given the time and space to thoughtfully consider each decision, without pressure or arbitrary deadlines. When it came time to finalize the documents, Andrew addressed our remaining changes promptly, with professionalism and a reassuring smile.

While cost is rarely the most important factor in matters like these, it is worth noting that his fees were reasonable, transparent, and consistent, one flat fee that covered the entire process, with no surprises.

We are truly grateful for Andrew’s guidance, and wholeheartedly recommend him and his services.

I’ve been a client for about a year, and my experience has been very mixed. Communication is poor — when you call your case manager, they rarely answer, and voicemails often go unreturned. Calls get routed around multiple times before anyone picks up, and if you want to speak directly to your case manager, you usually have to schedule through the receptionist.

It’s can be challenging to reach an attorney. Before they’ll connect you, they always ask why you’re calling, which made me feel like a bother rather than a valued client. Several important things that were promised to happen urgently were either delayed or not done at all, and when I asked about the gaps, my questions were ignored or deflected.

Even after a year, communication about settlement progress is unclear. I was told a hearing request would be submitted right away, only to find out a week later it hadn’t been filed yet. I eventually requested a new case manager because follow-through was consistently slow.

My claim was finally accepted almost a year after opening it, but the process has been exhausting. I’ve had to follow up constantly because updates are rarely provided unless I ask. I’m now out of state disability funds and waiting on a hearing date for temporary benefits, but I’m not allowed to call or assist with the process — even though delays leave me without pay.

At this point, I’m just hoping and praying nothing else falls through the cracks. Maybe my experience isn’t typical since many other reviews are positive, but for me, the lack of communication, delays, and uncertainty have made this process far more stressful than it needed to be.

reviews.text: Working with Attorney Anthony Kalikas wasn’t always the easiest, as he can be a very straightforward and at times difficult man to deal with. My car accident case had a lot of technical details that made things complicated on my end, but he still managed to bring about a positive result and even helped recommend counsel that helped get a counter-lawsuit against me removed. I respect his persistence and honesty, and I’m grateful for the outcome he achieved for me.
reviews.ownerResponse: James, thank you for taking the time to share your honest feedback. We appreciate your recognition of the persistence and straightforward approach we bring to each case. So I called to see if someone from here would take me on as a client and help me file a Tort Claim against the IL Army Reserves, since Marisa Ong is representing a family who's dog was killed by the Border Portal. I was told they could not help me in my case. This place puts a dog over a human. They also only help a different group of people and not other groups of people.  Here is the news report about they will represent a family who's dog was killed and not a human who was injured by the negligence of a IL Army Reserves maintenance command and team.

Ong explained that the family is filing an SF-95 federal claim-- a form used to present a claim against the federal government whenever there is a death, injury, or property damage caused by a federal worker.

reviews.text:
To Whom It May Concern,

I have carefully reviewed the settlement documents and must express serious concerns regarding the proposed deductions.

In April, I spoke with a representative from your office and our conversation was based on the requested take-home amount would be XxX. At no point was there any discussion of a 2% on withholding on the gross settlement or $15,000 in attorney fees. These charges appear arbitrary and excessive, particularly considering the trauma I’ve endured throughout this process.

To be clear, this case is rooted in a life-altering incident: my home—my sanctuary—was nearly destroyed. As a new homeowner, I lived through an unimaginable emotional and psychological ordeal. I was displaced, unsure of what the future held, and the stress affected my health, sleep, and overall well-being. My world felt like it had collapsed.

I find it unacceptable that legal professionals—who are expected to act in the best interest of their clients—would seek to capitalize disproportionately on a settlement intended to help me recover and rebuild. Legal ethics and standards of fairness should prevail in times like this.

I am respectfully requesting a reconsideration and renegotiation of the fee structure, given the nature of this personal crisis and the lack of transparency in the financial terms originally presented. A fair resolution would reflect both the verbal commitments made and the hardship I have already endured.

Matthew Clendenin and his team were absolutely amazing. I'm very thankful to have been with a great team that helped and led me through this difficult time. Leilani Greene who was a huge part of the team, was always very attentive and communicative about the status of the case and next steps the whole time. Truly couldn't have been in better hands. I would highly recommend this law firm.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you, Mayra, for your kind and thoughtful words. We’re so glad Matthew Clendenin, Leilani Greene, and the team were able to guide you with care and clarity during such a difficult time. Knowing you felt supported and well-informed means everything to us. We’re grateful for your trust and recommendation! Please don’t hesitate to reach out if you ever need anything in the future.

I believe it is my responsibility to share my experience with Attorney David Shapiro so others can understand what an extraordinary lawyer and person he truly is. I was referred to him by a trusted attorney friend, and from the very first meeting, I knew he was different. David listened carefully, asked the right questions, and put himself in my shoes to fully understand my situation. His attention to detail, compassion, and professionalism immediately gave me the confidence that I had found the right person to stand by me.

As a state inspector with over 36 years of experience, I’ve learned to recognize people who truly know their craft. David has that rare ability to see what most of us cannot connecting details, uncovering truths, and exposing facts hidden in reports, evidence, and testimony. For example, he analyzed the police report, video, and location of my case in ways I would never have thought of, finding connections that completely changed how the story was understood. His sharp mind and dedication impressed me beyond words.

What meant the most to me, though, was how I felt sitting beside him in court. Facing a judge is one of the most stressful experiences in life, but having David there gave me absolute confidence. I knew I was protected, that my story would be told clearly, and that the truth would be heard. That feeling of security is priceless.

When the result came, David congratulated me, and I told him honestly that I already knew because I knew who he was from the very beginning. My family and I are deeply grateful for his work, his kindness, and his belief in me during one of the hardest times of my life.

David Shapiro is not only an outstanding lawyer, but also one of the finest people I’ve ever met. He is genuine, compassionate, and fights for you as if you were family. I don’t wish legal battles on anyone, but if you ever need someone to stand up for you, he is the one you want by your side.

Thank you, David, and thank you to your entire team for standing by me, believing in me, and giving me strength when I needed it most.

reviews.text:
There are few events in life more terrifying than being accused of a crime by the state.

There I was, living my life, getting in my care to run an errand. My world changed in a moment. I was arrested and taken to jail. My home, car and possessions invaded. I felt violated, frightened and alone. That event would be the catalyst for David and the team entering my life.

My first encounter was with Stefano L. Molea, Esq, who visited me in jail. He asked about me as a person, took the time to answer my questions, gave me his thoughts. I felt something rarely felt in these types of interactions. I felt genuine care for my safety and my situation, genuine interest in me as a person. I immediately signed on as a client of David P. Shapiro Criminal Defense Attorneys.

I then got to meet David at my bail hearing. His demeanour was calming, and he had an air of confidence and experience - the kind of thing you see from people who are at the top of their game. I was impressed, needless to say.

David got me back home that evening.

The process that followed was life-dominating. My thoughts, actions, plans… they all forcible yielded to this new reality. David and the team acted as a reassuring hand, guiding me through a bewildering and terrifying experience. Whenever I had a question or suggested a strategy, David listened calmly and open-mindedly, then provided his feedback on why (or why not) my suggestion would be the best way to go. Inevitably, I took his suggestion. I am where I am today - all charges dismissed - because I trusted him.

David, Stefano, Dree and the rest of the team made me feel heard, respected and defended through a process during which I felt perpetually unsafe and in danger. I never felt like I was burdening them. I always felt important; always felt like a priority.

While I wish this never would have happened, I am glad my path crossed with David P. Shapiro Criminal Defense Attorneys.

If you or a loved on are in the same peril I was in, don’t hesitate. Call David’s firm. You won’t regret it!
reviews.ownerResponse: Your experience with our Firm is what EVERY individual facing criminal charges (should) expect and demand of the law firm they hire.  We are so happy to have been able to deliver an outright dismissal of all charges for you!

reviews.text: I definitely do not recommend them. They handled my husband’s case for 3 years and it was a huge disappointment. My husband has 2 slipped discs, 2 hip bones out of place, and arthritis in his hands from repetitive work with scissors. He worked for this company for 18 years and they think it’s fair to pay $17,500 and that’s where they charged their fees when they didn’t do a good job. Every time my husband called to inquire about his case, Diana Salazar was never available, they said they would return his call, but they didn’t. The worst mistake of my life was trusting a person who I thought was my friend, Mr. Enrique Solis from the Facebook group Retenes California. They recommend them knowing that they don’t do a good job. I let Mr. Rufino Montes know. The only time they were kind was the day that Mr. Isai Diego went to my home to take the case.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Ms. Arias, first, due to attorney-client privilege, we cannot respond with personal information through this platform for privacy reasons. Unfortunately, these forums allow you to post whatever you want, and we are limited in our response. We remind you that these cases are based on medical evidence from doctors, and it is the doctors who determine the extent of a person's injuries and the relationship between the injuries and their work. The judge reviews all medical reports before approving any settlement or release. It is important to understand this and that this type of case involves a technical process.

However, stating that Mr. Solís "knowing they don't do a good job" is a defamatory statement. Therefore, we ask that you contact our office within 24 hours to discuss this defamatory comment. If you do not, we will be forced to take legal action and sue our office for defamation damages.

reviews.text: Very bad service. The people who work with the lawyer in Chulavista are very rude. They argue with you, speak badly to you, don't answer, and don't know what they're doing. I've been dealing with him for over a year and they don't even speak to me. I had a doctor's appointment and they canceled it. I never even saw the lawyer. I don't recommend this lawyer at all. I don't know if it's the lawyer himself or the people who work in the office; they speak very nicely to you, but...
Attorney Antonio Cervantes and Mi Amigo Legal are helping me with my case

A truly awful experience. They didn't fight for my husband's rights. We made a huge mistake. Often, recommendations turn out worse than finding a good lawyer. We never even saw this man's face. His assistant, Adriana, didn't do what was necessary to fight for the rights of a human being, not just for money. I hope I never need them again. Three years of pursuing a case only to receive a pittance, after he was left with lifelong injuries, is simply not fair. I hope we can find some way to fight for the dignity of a person who worked hard at a company, was fired after an accident, and whose rights these lawyers failed to defend.
reviews.ownerResponse: Ms. Maricela, please send me an email at antonio@cervanteshodges.com to discuss your negative experience. Thank you.
Good morning Jay, can you please provide the best way for us to reach you and what time? You can email me directly at antonio@cervanteshodges.com

reviews.text:
How I regret having started my marriage with them. Very poor customer service. They were never in my favor. I don't recommend them, not even for a consultation. They're still far from being professionals. They're learning curves. Just remembering, my stomach turns. Diana Salazar, the one who assisted me, and the truth is they didn't do their job well. They're good at charging for nothing. Don't waste your time or money.

And she asks me what the best way to contact me is. With that, she tells me they know my entire number. Please. I regret having been born. Thanks to them. I don't know whether to laugh or cry. 😭

Now that my case is closed, they want to contact me. They did what they did at the beginning, but they didn't even make a call or anything. There's a huge lack of communication, and they still have a lot to learn.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Good afternoon, Mr. Velasquez. For privacy reasons, we cannot discuss your case in this public forum. We would be happy to address your questions through a more private channel. I sent an email to the address we have on file. I await your response. Thank you.

Let me explain, sir. We are asking you what the best way is to contact you to accommodate your schedule. However, I see that your intention is different. We remain at your service, and if you would like us to contact you, we would be happy to do so.

reviews.text: The entire staff is terrific.  Took great care of my case. Successfully settled.

I I went to Bruce Meth after my accident. He explained to me all the things I needed to do and answered all my questions. I would highly recommend going to Bruce because he is an excellent personal injury lawyer. I got a settlement that I was very happy with and the check within hours.

May 30, 2019

I am very pleased with the legal representation provided by Bruce Meth and assistant Kelley Stewart. In July 2018 I was injured in a severe auto crash in San Diego that was the fault of another driver.

Initially unsure of where to turn for legal help I found Mr. Meth and selected him, in part, because he has an office in our San Diego suburb. I also liked his reviews from other clients.

I called and was amazed that Mr. Meth was able to see me so quickly. In fact, he was able to see me that same day, just one day after the crash. I was clearly and accurately informed as to the details of our legal arrangement. After that, Mr. Meth and Kelley handled everything. They obtained the accident report from the California Highway Patrol, the names and addresses of the other drivers and all of their insurance information. They located all of my medical bills. I had to do nothing to find or receive anything. It was all very easy for me.

At the appropriate time Mr. Meth sent the demand letters to the at-fault parties. He did great follow-up work.

In the end, I am entirely satisfied with my settlement check. It happened exactly as Bruce Meth and Kelley Stewart had told us. The entire process took only a little more than 10 months.

Best regards,
David P.
Chula Vista, California
Easy to talk with

Every meeting or phone call with Larry he was extremely informative and kept us up to date every step of the way and made us feel comfortable during the worst time in our life. After Jake's death we met some good and not so good people in our Legal Battle but we made a Lifelong friend when we met Larry Sidiropoulos and his staff.

Mike, Lisa, Nikki and Jake Beetson

Two years ago (almost to the day) I was involved in a car accident against a large rental car company. I had no idea who to turn to or where to go. It was a modern day David v. Goliath scenario.

At first, I was referred to a crappy lawyer from Riverside by a family member. After months of getting no where with my first lawyer I quickly realized: this guy sucks. I was NOT happy. I then decided to seek better help.

I remember the first day I went to Larry's office, I remember how nice the 100 year old building was. The receptions are very nice and accommodating.

When I met with Larry for the first time and he was very down-to-earth, and didn't give off the typical "I'm smarter/better than you" lawyer vibe, which was great. He was very professional and explained to me everything in a way that a normal person would understand it. He was also very realistic in what we could expect to achieve with my case. He wanted to make it clear that my case would take time.

Another thing I was very happy to see was the fact that every person who had a hand in my case was the very top professional in his/her field. What I've realized is that in order to be the best, you should surround yourself with the best. When Larry would refer me to a doctor for an expert medical opinion I'd look up that doctor online and see the doctor would be highly accredited. Or when Larry sought out further assistance to lower my medical lien he teamed with the best of the best.

I would most definitely recommend the Sidiropoulos Law Firm to others. Heck, I'd trust Larry with my own family if anything ever happened (hopefully not).

I was charged with showing a MMA fight at my brewery.   Someone at a BBQ cook-off indeed showed the fight outside without our knowledge.  Unbeknownst to me, I was liable for the actions of others, it being on my property.  In my opinion, Joe hand productions and their agents are vile human beings that exploit people's ignorance of the existing laws, but I'm glad Mr. Paré contacted me to represent us.  While none of this was cheap, I think we got off with a good deal due to Mr Paré's expert advice and dealings with these snakes.  Take heed business owners - you can (and will) be held liable for UFC fights shown at your business - even in the corner of your property.   Joe Hand hires agents, presumably working on some sort of commission, to monitor social media and postings to see if an offense is likely to occur.
Mr. Paré handled everything in a timely and super professional matter and walked me through this irritating process.  I am super glad I had him as an attorney,  as I was blindsided by an unscrupulous group that instead of trying to protect their intellectual property, seems to seek out cases they know small businesses can't defend.
