Hi Robin, I am sorry to hear that our office did not deliver the client experience you should have received. It sounds like there was a lack of communication which led to you having less information than you should have had regarding your case and the personal injury process.

While I understand your frustration and don’t want to discount any part of your experience, I do want to mention that when the case wasn’t settling pre-litigation, our office arranged the attorney in Hawaii on your behalf, and that they began representing you over a month before the statute was going to expire. Without going into details in this public setting, the extension on the statute of limitations you mentioned was done as a matter of strategy, not necessity.

I am going to send you an email with my cell phone number. I hope that we can discuss these issues and address your concerns at a time that is convenient for you.

Sincerely,
Marlon Campos

I cannot thank Eric and Blanca enough for their incredible help with my husband’s workers' compensation claim. Having never hired an attorney before, this was completely new territory for us, and we were starting to feel lost in the process. Eric and Blanca took the time to sit down with us and explain the laws and state disability requirements in a way we could understand.

They were always available when we needed assistance and provided invaluable support when my case transitioned to a leave of absence and restricted work. They walked us  through how each process worked and made sure we understood every step. Their guidance and dedication were key in helping us successfully settle my claim.

If you're feeling overwhelmed with your workers' comp case, I highly recommend Eric and Blanca. Their knowledge, patience, and commitment to their clients truly set them apart!
Thanks Mr. Gritz and Blanca for an excellent job done. They are very professional and knowledgeable. They really care for my health and well being.

What could easily have been the most challenging times of my life wasn’t thanks to services provided by Eric and Blanca.
I was 3 months into a separation that led to a child custody case when I suffered an injury at work. Initially I was diagnosed with a contusion by Concentra, the clinic working for my employer, I was given Tylenol and released back to work. Anxiety took hold of me like never before. In one hand, the only thing in life I knew to do was work, thinking I have no choice but to return due to the expenses of my child custody case. On the other hand, I knew there was something wrong, so much more than a “contusion,” and I have a responsibility to keep myself healthy for my son/daughter. Days after I was referred to Eric Gritz, I made the call and kept my appointment. Soon after (one week or so) I began to receive temporary disability payouts from my employers insurance company and was referred to doctors who had my best interest in mind (turns out I had fractures in my lumbar). Thanks to Eric and Blanca I was able to focus on my recovery and remained financially stable to support my family and child custody case (in which I was granted custody of my children).
Needless to say, I recommend you call.
I did, nothing went wrong and there could have been no better outcome for my situation. ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

Eric Gritz is the best attorney in town. No doubt about it.

The last thing you want to think about is the stress of the medical bills piling up; however, Eric Gritz and his team helped me out through all this process, and I only have to concentrate on my recovery. I highly recommend you hiring Mr. Gritz as your attorney.

Eric has the know how and ambition to make things come out right and fair, while making you feel confident because of the great communication and that is a huge attribute if you know lawyers and the different styles. So 10 star ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐👍🏼

reviews.text: Victor Mordey is one of the best there is. I know it sounds cliche; however, I honestly do not have any complaints. Mr.Mordey is straight forward; he does not play games and gets down to business. I'm grateful that he was available to help me and guide me throughout my case. He always kept me updated. He is also honest and passionate about his work. It is evident that he values his clients and justice. Lawyers like Victor are rare to find. I recommend him to anyone that is seeking justice or is being treated unfairly and wants an honest lawyer to represent them. And He also speak perfect Spanish he always make me feel like a good friend.

My ex-lawyer had contacted a retirement company which had caused confusion regarding my documents. The costs of the lawyer and the retirement company were causing me stress. The case had been halted due to these confusing document issues. I searched on the internet for a lawyer specializing in Quadro-Retirement and found Mordey Law Firm. I did not hesitate; I contacted attorney Victor Morday, whose hourly rates were fair. He was always honest and diligent and finalized my Quadro-Retirement case with excellent and fair results. My ex-lawyer had contacted a Quadro-Retirement company that caused confusion and created confusion regarding my documents. I was desperate to settle the case between my ex-attorney and the Quadro Retirement company. I looked online for a Quadro-Retirement attorney. I found the Mordey Law Firm. Attorney Mordey helped me finalize my case and was stuck between my ex-attorney and the Quadro-retirement company. I recommend Mordey Law Firm.

Victor Mordey always gives his honest advice without any sugar coating, and for this reason, he is my go-to for child custody and divorce matters. He could use a receptionist, however, he prices are very fair and he will fight hard for you in court. I will continue to choose him for his character and support.

I’m so glad I got to work with Victor Mordey. He has been very helpful and understanding with my situation. He was always on top of my case and kept me up-to-date with everything. I would definitely work with him again, thank you for everything.

I highly recommend Victor as your choice for divorce attorney, he was amazing in handling my divorce case, helped me thru the whole process and always being there when i needed to clear any doubts i had, he will tell it to you straight as it is and i appreciate someone that does that instead of giving you the runaround, super affordable and will take care of you the whole way, thank you Victor for all your help thru this very difficult time in my life.
He teally kmow his business

There is no doubt that hiring this law office had allowed a lot of things to turn my way. At least one thing is going my way in all of this. Of course, it’s also the most important piece of the puzzle.

Victor has been the absolute best while working with me in my case! He is extremely knowledgeable and dependable! He has understood my situation to the T!!! He is without a doubt the best lawyer I have worked with, deeply appreciative for all he has done for me and my family! Would recommend to ANYONE!!!

I'm so glad that I found this office when I did. Things are looking much better for my divorce. Mr. Mordey has done a great job walking me through the process and helping me make choices that make the best sense.

We needed to apply for bankruptcy. The process was confusing until we came to speak with Mr. Mordey. He really took the time to help us through the process and to pick the right kind of bankruptcy for our needs and to protect our assests, limited as they may be.

Victor Mordey represented me in my divorce which unfortunately was very high conflict. It was such a stressful time, scary, especially with so much of the unknown. Luckily, Victor guided me step by step from day one until the very end. I cannot say enough kind words about Victor and all he has done for me and my children. My case started right at the beginning of Covid and Victor quickly adapted to everything being via zoom. Yes, everything was via zoom and sadly the courts were so over whelmed that my case kept getting pushed back. During the time of my case, victor communicated with me often, and walked me through everything that was happening behind the scenes. He never left me out of anything and was always 100% honest with me. I can tell you that I interviewed at least 10 divorce attorneys and Victor stood out so much because of how authentic he was and how he was willing to fight for me. I’ll never ever forget everything he has done for me, he stood up for me, presented details, facts to win my case, he knew my story, he believed in me and he was always 100% available for me. If you’re looking for an attorney who is a great communicator, knows family law and will support you till the very end, then you will find all of that and more in Victor.
Great attorney, he has represented me twice and won both cases I will forever be grateful with him!

Attorney Victor Mordey helped me with my custody case. The service was impressive, understanding, and efficient. He got straight to the point. Once he implemented the strategy, we received a response from the court (South Bay Courthouse) within weeks. He's an excellent lawyer. I will definitely recommend him.

Thank you, Victor.

I would like to express my gratitude for the legal services Mr. Victor Mordey provided. I am confident that his representation directly impacted the final outcome of my case. He was confident in his ability to obtain the best possible result. I would also like to add that his promptness in returning my calls and taking the time to answer  the numerous  questions that I asked meant so much to me. I am very impressed with his dedication and skills as a lawyer and will not hesitate to recommend his services to my family and friends.

Mr Mordey is an amazing attorney. He is affordable and worth every penny. He responds within 24 hours and kept me updated on my custody case. I am very grateful, my mother recommended him to me. He represented my mom and sister and won their cases too. The best decision I ever made. I whole heartedly recommend him.

I highly recommend Victor Mordey. I was so overwhelmed with everything but almost as soon as I came into his office, he took care of everything. Thanks to Victor Mordey, I have full custody. I recommend him to anyone and everyone. He is the best of the best.

Victor did a fantastic job with my case. I never expected to file bankruptcy so I really didn't know what I was dealing with. After consulting with Mr. Mordey I left feeling like I better understood the laws around it and like my case sat in good hands. I'm so glad I worked with him.

Victor is an amazing attorney to say the least! I originally hired Victor based upon his stellar reputation as well as his experience with appeals and I can say with full confidence that I am extremely glad I did. After months of working with Victor on my case through the appellate process, I have been nothing short of highly impressed with Victor's skill, knowledge, and professionalism.

He has been very thorough with my case, and he is always great about keeping me up to date on the latest updates, filings, etc. I also greatly appreciate how Victor always makes himself available to answer any questions that I may have regarding my case and the appeals process as a whole. This process was highly stressful prior to hiring Victor, however, once I knew I had Victor in my corner, my stress level instantly dropped tenfold.

I would highly recommend Victor without hesitation!

Absolutely a scam lawyer. Incompetent, unfriendly and outdated with his knowledge of family law. He is wasting your time, money, and energy, charging you for everything but not working in your favour. He never files your documents correctly, always missing pages, signatures and comments; he doesn't provide you with the information you need to know about your case. He keeps you in the dark until it is too late, and you lose your case in court. They are enough complaints about him filled to the bar of California, including mine. The reviews are paid reviews, as I haven't met anyone happy in his office. You might represent yourself better than having him as your lawyer!

The issue of child support was a real touchy one thanks to my ex. Every part of me wants to do right by my son and daughter but she made it clear she was going to do everything she could to misrepresent our situation to skew it in her favor. Victor Mordey is clearly an expert in his field in knowing exactly what is relevant, what could be harmful and what to emphasize. Thanks to him I am fulfilling my children’s needs without being taken for a fool.

Mr. Mordey is not only easily reachable; he responds quickly. I found those two factors to be so comforting throughout his representation. His practice is a far cry from those huge firms where you as a client are a tiny fish in a big sea of attorneys being passed around form one to the next as none of them even get to know you or your case.

The Law Office of Victor Mordey was highly recommended to me and I was told that they would do an outstanding job on my case. They absolutely did. Victor was a pleasure to work with, and helped me to understand each decision I had to make in great detail. Victor's intuition was right on as he helped me to keep custody of my children.
Diligent, knowledgeable and trustworthy. Mr. Mordey is an excellent attorney and I highly recommend him to anyone.

Victor was AWESOME! He helped me decide whether I should file a request to modify child support in my family law matter. He showed me that if I filed a request to modify child support, the child support practically wouldn't be changed at all. This isn't what I wanted to hear, but at least I know he was honest.

I’ve been in a high conflict child custody case for the last seven years. Attorney Victor Mordey has represented me for the last 3 years. He is professional, knowledgeable and a lawyer with integrity. He strives to close the case quickly with the best outcome. He responds quickly to my concerns whether via phone or email and has been a valuable asset throughout this difficult time.

Victor has been our Attorney for the last 10 years.  We recently went back to Court to fight for full custody of my younger daughter.  After all the hearings and appeals, we ended up getting 95% custody.  Victor never makes  promises on the outcome of your case but I guarantee that he will fight for you to the end. He is very honest and professional, and is also a dedicated family man. Thank you, Victor, for all that you have done for our family.

It’s a tough situation to look for a divorce lawyer as divorce itself is so challenging.  Luckily, I found Atty Mordey who is very competent, diligent and analytic... always on his feet 👍He never left me stranded since day 1.  He was very straightforward in telling me  what’s possible and impossible...never sugarcoats. Property, spousal support and my ex’s debt issues were resolved making it sure that I am protected from future financial troubles. Thankfully, he saved me from paying alimony.  The outcome achieved was more than I hoped for. My family and I will be forever grateful for his great service.  Thank you Atty Victor 😊. Divorce is such a nightmare but you absolutely helped me woke up smiling 😁😁😁May God bless you always.  Highly recommended!!!
Victor Mordey provided outstanding legal advice and guidance. I am very thankful and I highly recommend him to anyone seeking the best family law attorney.
Excellent attorney. Was my mother’s attorney when I was a child and also my attorney when I became a mother. Thank you!

I found myself in a tough financial situation and I was wondering if bankruptcy was the right choice. Victor Mordey guided me through the entire process and made it very easy and understandable. He filed my case and it was approved. There is no reason to suffer if you do not have to. Now I am debt-free and rebuilding my credit. Attorney Mordey was compassionate, easy to work with, and he did what he said he would do.

I was struggling with visitation during the time my ex wife filed for divorce. It was a real messy situation. I didn't want to fight and neither did my ex wife. Victor encouraged me not to fight and was happy to help me. With Victor by my side, my ex and I were able to come up with a good schedule for visitation. We eventually ended up with a child custody and visitation schedule that my ex wife and I were both happy with.
MR Mordey is an excellent attorney. In my experience he went above and beyond the call of duty... He was very efficient, timely and thorough. A true professional and a pleasure to deal with.

reviews.text: My ex-husband and I have been battling for custody of our son. I've visited many family lawyers but I just couldn't afford them. I didn't know what to do because my son is my world. Victor Mordey is so helpful and affordable. I'm beyond grateful to have found him! I have no doubt that he will get me the results I want.

Result driven and knowledgeable family law attorney. I was referred to his office by a very good friend. The service and advice I received in my custody case was far above what I expected. If you're looking for results visit him.

My wife and I are currently going through a divorce. She tried to pull all the money out of her 401K so she didn’t have to split it with me along with our other assets. I sat down with Victor Mordey and discussed QDRO and the 401K split. I chose him as my attorney and he delivered! The 401K was split in half. Hire him in you’re looking for results.

Victor Mordey is without a doubt the best child custody lawyer in the south bay. Choosing the right lawyer for family court is one of the most important decisions you'll ever make. Unfortunately I had to learn the hard way twice with lawyers that over charged me and did little to defend my case in court. Victor on the other hand lays out his very reasonable prices in advance, and more importantly steps up to the plate for you in front of the judge. He's been in business in Chula Vista for a long time and knows all the judges and other local lawyers. I was recommended him by the San Diego County Bar Association. I am a Dad that currently has 50%+ custody of my son and I no longer pay child support, which would not have been possible without Victor Mordey.

If you'd like any more info or there's any tips I can pass along, feel free to message me.

Victor mordey is the mvp of attorneys!! He is extremely knowedgeable and highly motivated towards helping you win your case. Being a father fighting for custody is an uphill battle for most dads and i really felt like my back was against the wall. Victor is very organized and competent and showed me that a good father has the same rights as the mother does and that made me feel good inside. Victor is very caring and straightforward and i would recommend him to any of my family members and friends......he's simply awesome!!👍

I hired Victor for my divorce. Divorce is one of the hardest things anyone could do and Victor was very helpful in all aspect of the trial. He was very communicative and very aggressive for my right as a father. When my ex wife filed for full custody Victor Fought for what was right and reasonable that was 50-50 Custody, also recommended someone for our mediation prep. Victor tells you things like they are and does not sugar coat them at all. Financially he also fought for what was fair and right, even though there are no winners in divorce I can honestly say our camp came out victorious since we got everything we asked for and more. I have since then recommended Victor to a few of my friends for their cases. I hope I do not have to use another lawyer again but If need shall come i will more than definitely re hire Victor.

Victor is by far the best attorney around!  I unfortunately found myself on the other side of a custody battle that went south.  Victor is the best investment I could have made for my children and their future.  Victor was always available for me to express my concerns or ask my many questions, no matter how petty they may have been.  He was able to gently remind me that the children's best interest is the most important part of the big picture and to keep my focus on that. I am grateful that I am able to call him my attorney for the past 3 years and will continue to have him for the next 12 years.  I would ABSOLUTELY 100% recommend him to anyone that is in the painful situation of needing his services.

Summary... unprofessional and unserious.

reviews.text: I have to say that Mr. Orozco is by far the best attorney out there today. The simple fact that he was by my side and took the time to listen and fight for what I was going through was great. I have had full custody of my daughter and the mother just kept taking me back to court over nonsense for over 10 years. Keep in mind that she hasn’t seen my daughter within those 10 years. And the courts just allowed her to keep filling non sense motions. But she never ever took the time to come through on her end. I spent well over $40k in other lawyers within the 10 years. When I met Mr. Orozco he simply put a stop to all the court hearings and ended what other lawyers weren’t whiling to do. He helped  me get the move away order and get my daughters last name change to mine. I was finally able to move on and live my life with my family. Which I wasn’t able to till I found Mr. Orozco. I highly recommend him to the fullest. He was truly a blessing in disguise.

Noelle swooped in literally at the last hour (a couple of days before my MSC) and helped me tremendously in completing my divorce. I noticed that her strong understanding of family law got her quickly into my case and she was able to move quickly in my best interest. She kept me calm when I felt panicky. She provided me great information that helped me make sound decisions during the MSC. I've been through 2 other attorneys before her and felt very much pushed around. Noelle provided me far more legal counsel in the short time I worked with her than the other attorneys that tend to rack up hours. Divorce has been a painful, life sucking, expensive process. I wish I met Noelle first. What stands out about her is that she has that knowledge base at her fingertip but more importantly, she saw me and my situation as a whole. She approached my situation with finesse. She understands that there are people and family behind these court cases and that makes all the difference in the world. I very much appreciate all of the expertise she provided on top of her compassion. I would highly recommend her!!!

I was in jail waiting for my jury trial, but due to covid 19, the courts suspended all jury trial for over a year.  My bail amount was set at 1 million. I could not afford to bail out with a1 million dollar bail amount. During this time, I was represented by a public defender. The public defender was nice but did not push for a lower bail amount. My mother reached out to Attorney, Jose Orozco, and with the help of family we retained his services. Mr. Orozco immediately went to work and after three attempts, my bail was reduced to $100k which allowed me to bail out while I awaited my day in court. If it wasn't for Mr. Orozco, I would have been in jail for over almost two years waiting for my trial during covid closures. He is aggressive and doesn't give you B.S. I highly recommend him.

The paralegal, Selena Rios Coleman, was especially helpful and professional, staying in touch and responding as quickly as possible whenever I had questions.

Mr. James Sexton was also very professional and did a phenomenal job handling my case. Their communication, professionalism, and support made the entire process much easier. I highly recommend Sexton Law Firm to anyone needing help with a workers’ compensation injury case.

I first met attorney Andrew Sexton in 2019 when he guided a friend of mine through a difficult financial situation. My friend spoke so highly of him that when we decided to establish a trust, we immediately turned to Andrew.

Working with him on such an important matter has been an absolute pleasure. His calm demeanor, deep expertise in trust and estate law, and steady confidence put us at ease from the start. He carefully listened to our needs and requests, thoughtfully incorporating each one into our trust documents.

Our revisions were extensive, including the added complexity of creating a secondary trust within our primary trust. Andrew handled every detail seamlessly and ultimately crafted a beautifully structured trust that reflected everything we hoped for - often understanding our intentions even when we struggled to articulate them clearly ourselves.

His follow-up was impeccable: always available when needed, yet never rushing us. We were given the time and space to thoughtfully consider each decision, without pressure or arbitrary deadlines. When it came time to finalize the documents, Andrew addressed our remaining changes promptly, with professionalism and a reassuring smile.

While cost is rarely the most important factor in matters like these, it is worth noting that his fees were reasonable, transparent, and consistent, one flat fee that covered the entire process, with no surprises.

We are truly grateful for Andrew’s guidance, and wholeheartedly recommend him and his services.

“My experience with this firm was disappointing. Communication was inconsistent, and I often felt left in the dark about my case. I ultimately chose different representation and felt more supported elsewhere.”

I’ve been a client for about a year, and my experience has been very mixed. Communication is poor — when you call your case manager, they rarely answer, and voicemails often go unreturned. Calls get routed around multiple times before anyone picks up, and if you want to speak directly to your case manager, you usually have to schedule through the receptionist.

It’s can be challenging to reach an attorney. Before they’ll connect you, they always ask why you’re calling, which made me feel like a bother rather than a valued client. Several important things that were promised to happen urgently were either delayed or not done at all, and when I asked about the gaps, my questions were ignored or deflected.

Even after a year, communication about settlement progress is unclear. I was told a hearing request would be submitted right away, only to find out a week later it hadn’t been filed yet. I eventually requested a new case manager because follow-through was consistently slow.

My claim was finally accepted almost a year after opening it, but the process has been exhausting. I’ve had to follow up constantly because updates are rarely provided unless I ask. I’m now out of state disability funds and waiting on a hearing date for temporary benefits, but I’m not allowed to call or assist with the process — even though delays leave me without pay.

At this point, I’m just hoping and praying nothing else falls through the cracks. Maybe my experience isn’t typical since many other reviews are positive, but for me, the lack of communication, delays, and uncertainty have made this process far more stressful than it needed to be.

Cool, if you would have looked into an orthopedist for me that would actually treat me Two months ago when I was injured, maybe I wouldn't be in pain and would be able to go back to work by now! I retained Kazerouni Law Group in July 2024 regarding the AT&T data breach matter. I signed a formal representation agreement and entrusted the firm with sensitive personal information.

From the time I retained the firm through the alleged “withdrawal” of my claim, I never once received direct communication from an attorney regarding any settlement offer, approval requirement, or firm deadline requiring my action.

Instead, I received automated emails stating that my claim was under investigation.

Over the course of nearly two years:

• I called repeatedly — most calls went unanswered.
• When I did reach someone, I was told notes would be left for the attorney to call me back. No attorney ever did.
• I left multiple voicemails that were never returned.
• I was told by representatives to disregard automated deadline notices because the Claims Administrator had “dropped the ball” and many affected individuals were not being properly contacted.
• I was told at one point that only one individual was handling the AT&T claims, which was given as the reason for delays.

On a Tuesday, I informed the firm that if I did not receive communication by Friday, I would post publicly regarding the lack of response. That same Friday was the first time I received direct email communication from an attorney — and it was to inform me that my claim had been deemed withdrawn due to a missed deadline.

At no point prior to that Friday communication did an attorney personally contact me regarding settlement approval — despite my representation agreement stating that I retain the right to approve any settlement of my claim.

My husband also signed a separate representation agreement with this firm regarding the same AT&T matter. To date, he has likewise not received direct attorney communication regarding his claim.

This has been the worst communication experience I have ever had with legal representation, particularly with an out-of-state firm. Clients deserve direct, meaningful communication — not automated messages, unanswered calls, and silence followed by withdrawal.

I deeply regret trusting this firm with my case and my personal information. I have documentation of my repeated attempts to obtain updates.

I am requesting immediate contact from a supervising attorney to formally address how these claims were handled.

Do not work with them. I was “helped” by Crosby and I never heard from him unless I reached out first. He did not have my best interest when negotiating for me, he just told me to sign and detail with the settlement!

Nothing is scarier than receiving a letter in the mail that you may be sued. That happened to me 2 months ago, but like many, thought nothing of it...until that exact evening. A court officer served me a lawsuit saying I owed a debt from ages ago that was finally sold off. The balance was originally $4500, but due to a divorce that got messy and job changes, that debt wasn't paid and the final tally was $6800. Needless to say I didn't have that money...but I called the letter that warned me about the serving papers.

The staff was amazingly friendly and they scheduled me an appointment the very next day with Crosby Connolly. Crosby walked me thru the process, said it happens when debts don't get settled, a company buys them off the creditor and takes it over. We then went over a game plan and my situation which he was super understanding. He then said to not talk to them anymore if they call, to fill out some paperwork, and of course pay his fee which was more than reasonable considering. With the court fees and everything, I was easily looking at $10k bill, but Mr. Connolly got it down to $5.1k so long as I make consistent payments. He even got them to do an extended payment plan so the monthly cost is smaller. He held my hand the whole way and worked hard for me to try and get lower, but the agreed amount was still a win in my book. If you have a debt that is scaring you, and you were served papers, get representation. It can only help you. If you don't know who to call, call the guys at Kazerouni Law Group, I know they'll help you as Crosby did for me. I am forever grateful for this man during a dark time in my life.
Crosby helped ease my worries that I was facing with my future financial situation. He was Incredibly communicative and very available throughout the whole process.

Have you ever felt like your life is falling apart all around you and you’re suffocating trying to get air to breathe ? Yeah? Me too. That’s how it felt getting hounded by debt collectors after I had gone through a very messy separation and divorce filing that left me thousands upon thousands of dollars in credit card debt . I couldn’t afford to pay my mortgage, childcare , groceries , and the credit cards ended up going to collections after I lost my job. I stupidly got a consolidation loan to try to cover the lawyers and that got eaten up right away . I was getting served at my house, and I can’t tell you how scary it is to have these companies come after you and then keep showing up at your house , not to mention the embarrassment and shame. I have two little ones to support and the constant harassment by them was terrifying.  I was broken down and at my wits end when I started to look online for help with a debt lawyer to help me. I came across Kazerouni Law Group. I decided to call the number . Crosby answered right away. I was shocked that one of the partners answered to be honest . I broke down crying about how scared I was and felt through this whole ordeal. The guy deserves a medal for how patient and caring he was to listen to me . He never once cut me off . After he heard me , he told me , “Don’t worry about a thing , I’ve got you ! Send me what you’re getting and I’ll handle this for you , you will never have to talk to them again, I’ll do the talking and they can’t contact you again.  “ I can’t tell you the feeling of just being able to get oxygen back into my lungs . I’m not trying to be dramatic but tell you the truth . I felt like I could finally have an advocate fighting for me . And I firmly believe the Lord had blessed me with finding this group to help me through this dark time . And I honestly can say Crosby had literally been my knight in shining armor . Trust me , I didn’t just have one credit card company to work with . I had 3 banks , and 2 consolidation loans all in after my messy divorce filing . I was taken to the cleaners by the divorce lawyers . Crosby successfully negotiated on all counts for me on my behalf . The fact that I never had to talk to a single debt collector or legal firm from any of them , was the most significant factor for me . The peace of mind of knowing I had someone in my corner advocating for me , was the answer to my prayers  and delivery was the home run! I know that everything happens for a reason . And I firmly believe that God used people to carry out His work and miracles . And the Lord blessed me with Crosby and the Kazerouni Law Group. Let me also tell you, They never took advantage of me on the fees either ! It was so hard to trust any lawyers after the tens of thousands the divorce lawyers drained me of . What Crosby and Kazerouni Law Group billed me for was Pennies in comparison to the mountain of debt coming after me . I checked with other company’s as well , they couldn’t even hold a stadium full of lights against Kazerouni Law Group. I want to end this all with saying , there is hope . You don’t have to live in this fear and shame . There is a light at the end of the tunnel . Crosby never let me navigate this alone . He was at the front of the line , leading the way against my accusers and claimed victory from every battle coming against me . His team was all helpful and caring and compassionate . Your search for help , has brought you to the best that this world has to offer. Don’t waste any more time searching , you have found relief . Call Kazerouni Law Group , you have found the best this industry has to give that baton over to, and let them carry you across the line to freedom . God bless you , and God bless Crosby and the Kazerouni Law Group ! My family is eternally grateful for you !

reviews.text:
Among many others who have gone through Worker's Comp for the first time, in particular, I was given no other choice in the end but to contact an Attorney.
I knew going into Worker's Comp, it would be a nightmare. However, the way I had been treated and was given false hope, I felt was unnecessary. The first doctor I met in the beginning was not very helpful and then the second doctor convinced me they truly would help until one day, out of nowhere, his demeanor changed to he couldn't help me and would need to deal with the pain. Meanwhile, I could not return to work and because it was my first time going through Worker's Comp, I thought it was hopeless. Thinking I had no other choice, I tried returning to work but even my Manager told me I could not do the tasks my job required from me. I could not get disability, my pain was getting worse and spreading. I felt trapped and was worried I would lose my job.
Then as I searched for stories of other victims that had gone through Worker's Comp, I found hope. They all suggested I seek out for an Attorney. I did and fell upon a review that someone had gone through something similar and recommended this Law firm and their Attorney, Christian Chambers, in particular. Therefore, I took a chance. The moment I spoke with Mr. Chambers I knew from his demeanor over the phone and the empathy through his voice that I had a chance of being taken care of.
Now again, I had never gone through this process in needing an Attorney before and was not sure how things worked. The moment he took me on, was amazing. He made sure to explain things and clarify certain terms I did not understand about so that I knew what he was doing. He even recommended me towards the right people along the way.
I understood that he was busy and juggling multiple cases alongside mine at the same time, but he still was attentive and kept in communication with me at all times through mainly email - no later than the next day or day after. His assistant as well was always helpful and polite.
Not that I wish this, but if I do ever get hurt on another job again or my friends/family ever got hurt on the job, he is the one I would highly recommend.
I was hurt in 2021, so because of COVID, we never had the chance to meet face to face, but again, always kept in contact. We settled recently and I felt he went above and beyond, truly and genuinely cares about helping people out. He never made me feel like I was just another case and had to follow a script at any point. So thank you Chris for helping me. :)
reviews.ownerResponse: We're glad to hear Christian Chambers provided exceptional guidance and support during your difficult experience with Worker's Compensation. Your feedback is appreciated.

reviews.text: They treat you here like family, going above and beyond to ensure you receive not only the best possible care but also the most favorable outcome for your situation. Their attention to detail and genuine compassion set them apart. I wouldn’t trust anyone else.

Workers Compensation cases can seem endless. You don’t know exactly what to do and you soon realize that your employer and their insurance company don’t have your best interest in mind. The insurance company represents the employer, not the employee. That’s about the time I contacted Christian Chambers. I wasn’t being treated fairly and I needed legal assistance.
I underwent one very painful surgery with the surgeon provided by the employer’s insurance. My post-op condition caused me to be off work for six months. I had an ugly scar and a lot of pain and swelling.
After being told by the worker’s compensation doctor that my condition would improve, I spoke with Christian. He got me an appointment with a doctor who helped diagnose my condition. Christian also put me in contact with another surgeon. I had a second surgery and my down time post-op was just a few days. Without Christian’s diligence and understanding, I would’ve been stuck with a painful injury and limited mobility.
When it came time for the deposition with opposing counsel, John Kiwan guided me through the process. I was a little nervous, but John was very supportive. The process went well.
There are so many twists and turns in a case like this, without proper representation, the insurance company prevails. My case was settled with substantial compensation. Just in time for the Holidays. I’m grateful to the staff and attorneys at Kiwan and Chambers. They work tirelessly for clients. I will continue to recommend them in the future.

Mr. Chambers made sure I was feeling better after all my surgeries and made sure I felt safe and comfortable at home.
If this isn't the family attorneys your looking for I don't know what else to tell you because this team, Mr. Chambers has the upmost professional kindness, support, emotional understanding anyone could ever receive. Mr. Chambers spoke out for me when my voice was being shut down from work/management and he heard my tears even when I didn't say much.

I hired Rick G Melendez Law to handle a critical legal matter, but the experience was extremely disappointing. After taking on my case, the attorney completely dropped the ball and then sat on it for two months, allowing a crucial deadline to pass. That failure put me in a difficult and avoidable position.

Attorney Golchin started the process from San Diego, CA. He hired another attorney in TX, and they got me out within a month. I returned to San Diego and obtained my green card in July 2012. After completing my five-year residency, I returned to Mr. Golchin to start my process for American citizenship again. I was arrested for a DUI in April 2011, and I didn't want it to affect my documentation process. I know Golchin is a professional attorney and, in my experience, he got me through a very painful experience. And this time, tomorrow, I'll obtain my American citizenship. Woohoo!!!!!

reviews.text:
After 48 hours of searching and speaking with over five different law firms, most of whom shuffled me through paralegals, Jamal picked up the phone. Literally - he answered my call directly and provided an immediate, calming presence to a deeply upsetting employment matter.

I entered this process with very little "legal health" or confidence, but Jamal changed that. He didn't just represent me; he educated me. The knowledge I gained in what it takes to stand up to a large corporation was priceless. And ultimately, the result of my claims was financially net positive because of Jamal’s representation.

I highly recommend Jamal to any working-class individual, especially first-time legal clients. He redefines what a lawyer should be. He isn't just looking for a payout; he provides the counsel and grounding needed to navigate a legal battle.

After separation from my former employer, I retained Kamandy Labor Law to represent me. I'm glad I did. I found Jamal to be experienced, professional, communicative, efficient, and effective. I highly recommend Kamandy Labor Law.
Jamal did a fantastic job. Thank you!

I had a really great experience working with Kamandy Labor Law. Mr. Kamandy was incredibly knowledgeable, responsive, and thoughtful throughout the entire process. He helped me navigate a complex employment and equity situation with clarity and confidence, always taking the time to explain my options in a way that felt grounded and reassuring.

What truly set him apart was his level of care and availability. On more than one occasion, he made himself available outside of normal work hours to ensure I felt supported during time-sensitive moments, which meant more to me than I can express. His professionalism and genuine commitment to his clients are exceptional.
I found myself in a situation I never thought I would be in. Kamandy Law Group is friendly and professional. I had so many questions and Jamal took the time to answer all of them.

No, he did not work for my former employer, but he worked for me in an unlawful termination lawsuit with my former employer. I expected answers and not flippant responses. The way I see it, not a very good example of people or professional skills
reviews.ownerResponse: Hi Kerry, thank you for your feedback. So sorry to hear that you felt as though you had a negative experience working with our firm. We are more than happy to speak with you about the issues that you had working with us, but we cannot discuss the specific facts related to your case publicly here. However, if you would like to further discuss, please feel free to reach out to us via phone or email at any time.  Best of luck to you.

reviews.text: I want to thank Jamal for taking on my case. From the moment I contacted him he made sure I was in the loop for every step of the process. I appreciate him fighting so hard for me and making sure I was heard. If I had any questions I could call to get all of them answered any time of the day. Will definitely be referring all friends/family who need a great lawyer to Jamal at Kamandy Labor Law

I was approached by several other law firms, but choosing Jamal Kamandy to represent me in my case was the best decision I could have made. From day one, Jamal fought tirelessly on my behalf and gave me a voice when I felt like I had none. His expert advice and unwavering support helped me navigate a challenging situation, and I always felt I could trust his guidance. Thanks to his dedication, the results were far beyond my expectations. If you’re looking for a lawyer who will truly fight for you, Jamal Kamandy is the one. I’m truly grateful for Mr. Kamandy.
Amazing Attorney. Amazing Person. The type of attorney you want standing with you in challenging times.Very Poised. Gets results.

I recently had the pleasure of working with Attorney Kamandy where he represented my interest in a legal matter. Thanks to his help and expertise, we were able to attain a great outcome and final settlement.  He is very knowledgeable and was able to make a realistic assessment of relevant information to come up with an effective strategy for the case.  I also appreciated his calm and measured demeanor throughout my interactions with him.   I would highly recommend Attorny Kamandy as a knowledgeable and effective lawyer as your legal representative.
fantastic experience with my case. Jamal dropped everything for me when I needed him most.

I am glad that I had Mr. Kamandy represent me. I would definitely recommend him to my friends and family. I had a very hard case, he worked with me and made everything  very simple for me to understand, also for me to accomplish. I'm glad I found him and I would give him more then 5 starts however i cant. he has earned all 5 from me. Thank you again for everything...
Great to work with Jamal.. our partnership was a success. Very good communication throughout. Highly recommended…

I am so thankful that I found Jamal to represent me. He kept me updated throughout the entire process. Jamal provided me with his professional guidance and explained everything with thorough detail. I am very pleased with the outcome and the entire process. I would highly recommend him and his firm. Thank you Jamal!

I recently had the pleasure of working with Jamal and can confidently say I am pleased with the outcome. Jamal demonstrated professionalism, expertise and knowledge. He was responsive and always kept me up to date. Only somewhat bummer was the 40% lawyer’s fee but that was my choice to agree to it, ultimately.

Great service!Jamal was on the top of
my case.True professional
Extremely happy with Mr. Kamandy and his services. He gave me free consultation and legal advice for my scenario. Thank you to the team at Kamandy Labor Law.

Mr Kamandy is a professional and knowledgable attorney that really know how to take care of Labor Law disputes. Communication with him was always timely and professional. We whole heartedly recommend Mr Kamandy without reservation and we can’t thank him enough for what he accomplished for us.
Mr. Kamandy was amazing at being my legal representation for my case. Very helpful and knowledgeable, he made the process as smooth as possible. I'm very thankful for his help.

A wonderful experience dealing with this Lawfirm helped relieve a lot of stress over the case and explained to me step by step on the progression of the case and overall a great help !! I would recommend to any one !!!

Jamal is truly a great lawyer! He's very knowledgeable, calm, respectful and knows the law. My case was weaker than a 2 week old infant trying to stand up but he was very diligent and persistent despite the obstacles. Out of the 5 lawyer's I contacted, he was the only one willing to take it on. I truly appreciate him and his law firm for being willing to help me through the entire process. Thank you Jamal!
Jamal was very professional and kept me informed of any changes and or new information, I highly recommend him and the firm. Thank you from Gina Sotolongo
Great team and they will fight for you.

I had a serious issue with a previous employer. Fortunately, I found this lawyer. He broke down everything very clear in the beginning and helped me to make decisions. He was a big help in me seeing the resolution that I deserved.

He is very experienced,  informative, trustworthy, and follows through. I definitely recommend him.

Respectfully, Christian Sanchez
Very professional attorney. Always informed me on the progress of the case in a timely manner. Always returned my emails when I emailed them. He fought hard for me on my case. Highly recommend him

I’m not currently a client for Jamal Kamandy but he was super helpful, knowledgeable and ready to help me get the information needed to make the right decision for my family.  During a challenging time I really needed some guidance as this is all new to me. The  professionalism and understanding from Jamal was invaluable and extremely helpful. Would highly recommend this firm to any friend or family!

I had the privilege of having Jamal Kamandy, Esq. as my attorney, and I can't express enough how satisfied I am with his services. From the moment I reached out to him, it was evident that he took a genuine interest in my case.

Esq. Kamandy handled my legal matters with the utmost care and professionalism. What impressed me even more was his unwavering commitment, even when he was dealing with personal matters. He never let anything compromise the attention and dedication he provided to me as his client.

I must admit, I wasn't the easiest client to work with, but Esq. Kamandy's patience and candid attitude made a significant difference. He listened, he advised, and he navigated my case with precision and expertise.

Without a doubt, I would highly recommend Jamal Kamandy, Esq. to anyone seeking legal assistance. His dedication, professionalism, and genuine care for his clients are truly commendable, and I am grateful for his support throughout my legal journey.

Jamal Kamandy listened to me and really understood my situation. He uses his skill to explain every legal aspect of your case to you and then he fights for you to have the best possible outcome. I'm glad I called this law firm and I definitely recommend him to anyone who is seeking help from unjustified and illegal actions being taken upon them. Thank you again Jamal!
I recommend attorney Jamal Kamandy to my daughter and the outcome was fair and prompt I would definitely recommend him again

Very satisfied with his professionalism, all the process was clear and transparently explained.
Good compensation gained thanks to Mr Kammandy.
Best lawyer ever! Went to him for help and honestly did the best job ever of winning my case! I highly recommend Kamandy law firm for your lawsuit!!

Great communicator, Very professional, great personality and  knowledgeable!!
Thank you very much for all your help and support.

If you are looking for a great, compassionate lawyer, you’ve found it in Jamal Kamandy.  He really listens, is honest and knowledgeable in talking about the legal issues and process involved, and works hard to help his clients. Definitely recommend.
Great experience! Great lawyer!!!

Jamal was excellent in handling my case. Very thankful for how easy he made this process and in a timely manner. Helped navigate me through the entire process and answered any question I had. Truly has your best interest in mind. Will certainly recommend Jamal to anyone who may need his representation.

I am so glad I chose to file with Kamandy. I had no idea where to start with this process and Mr. Kamandy made the entire thing easy to understand and started the claim quickly.

I am very satisfied with his work and would recommend him to everyone.

Thank you!
If you find yourself in need of representation Mr. Kamandy is the best choice! He is truly an honest, and trust worthy professional.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you Mary! It was an honor representing you and we are so happy to hear you had a good experience with our office. We truly appreciate you.
